artifacts.abstract_zh: 下一代巡天项目，如欧几里得巡天、时空遗产巡天（LSST）和中国空间站望远镜（CSST）巡天，预计将发现约10^5个星系-星系尺度强引力透镜。这促使开发可扩展且稳健的透镜建模方法，以便在高分辨率后续观测之前，能够高效可靠地从广域巡天数据集中学习。我们设计了一个可扩展的、基于贝叶斯和Lenstronomy的流水线，并将其应用于一个由16个透镜候选体组成的样本，这些候选体是用麦哲伦望远镜上的南天天体观测并行成像仪（PISCO）观测的。PISCO提供四个波段（z、i、r、g）的成像，其颜色、深度和视宁度条件与LSST相当。为了充分利用该数据集的约束能力，我们的流水线执行同步多波段建模，在所有四个波段中使用共同的质量分布，同时允许每个波段有独立的光分布。这种方法利用颜色信息对透镜质量提供联合约束，与单波段分析相比，减少了不确定性。16个PISCO透镜候选体中有15个成功恢复，并具有可解释的透镜构型，包括DESJ0533-2536，这是首个报道的双曲脐点星系-星系尺度强透镜候选体。我们进一步评估了在PISCO类数据的分辨率和视宁度下，能够可靠约束的模型复杂度。总体而言，我们的结果表明，对地面数据进行可扩展的多波段透镜建模能够提取质量和源形态的有意义约束，为最大化即将到来的巡天中大量样本的科学回报提供了实用途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，可扩展的地面数据多波段透镜建模能够提取质量和源形态的有意义约束，为最大化即将到来的巡天中大量样本的科学回报提供了实用途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Dark Energy Survey (DES) data of the 16 lens candidates identified using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) (Jacobs et al. , 2019 , 2019 ) . In most cases, the central lens galaxies appear red or orange, consistent with their quenched nature, while the lensed background sources are blue, reflecting ongoing star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用卷积神经网络（CNN）识别的16个透镜候选体的暗能量巡天（DES）数据（Jacobs等人，2019，2019）。在大多数情况下，中心透镜星系呈现红色或橙色，与其淬灭性质一致，而透镜化的背景源呈现蓝色，反映了持续的恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Summary of model configurations adopted for each system. The mass profile is consistent across all bands, while the light profiles of the deflector(s) and source(s) may either share the same model across bands or adopt different components, with separate parameters for each band. If present, satellite components are modeled as stated in the table.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个系统采用的模型配置总结。质量分布在所有波段中一致，而偏转体和源的光分布可以在各波段共享相同模型，或采用不同组件，每个波段有独立参数。如果存在卫星组件，则按表中所述进行建模。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Three-panel overview of all 16 lens systems. Each panel shows 2×8 images arranged by candidate ID. From top to bottom: (1) observed data, (2) best-fit lens model reconstructions, and (3) source-plane reconstructions. Each image is created by stacking the \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , and \(g\) bands after registering them to the \(r\) -band frame, with a label in the top-left corner. The reconstructions represent the highest likelihood lens configurations in the MCMC chain, under the best-performing lens models (grey-highlighted row in Table 2 ), with red critical curves overlaid in the lens plane and white caustic curves shown in the source plane. The presence (or absence) of an inner critical curve (corresponding to the outer caustic in the source plane) reflects the slope of the mass density profile, appearing only when the logarithmic slope is shallower than isothermal ( \(\gamma
figures.caption_zh: 图2：所有16个透镜系统的三面板概览。每个面板显示按候选体ID排列的2×8张图像。从上到下依次为：（1）观测数据，（2）最佳拟合透镜模型重建，以及（3）源平面重建。每张图像通过将\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)和\(g\)波段配准到\(r\)波段帧后叠加而成，左上角有标签。重建结果代表MCMC链中最高似然度的透镜构型，基于表现最佳的透镜模型（表2中灰色高亮行），红色临界曲线叠加在透镜平面，白色焦散曲线显示在源平面。内临界曲线（对应源平面的外焦散）的存在（或缺失）反映了质量密度分布的斜率，仅当对数斜率比等温（\(\gamma\)）更浅时出现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Example of multi–band gravitational lens reconstruction for the system DESJ2032-5658. Each row corresponds to a different filter— \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , and \(g\) from top to bottom—followed by a composite color image based on band-normalized data in the final row. The columns display: (i) observed data; (ii) reconstructed model image with red critical curves; (iii) normalized residuals, defined as \(({model}-{data})/\sigma\) ; (iv) source-plane reconstruction with white caustics; and (v) lensed source light in the image plane, also with red critical curves. Within each band, a consistent color scale is used for the data, model, and lensed source image, revealing the increasing prominence of the lensed source in bluer bands. Critical curves, computed from a shared mass model, are transformed into each band’s frame using the inferred relative shifts and rotations with respect to the r-band. For the composite row, all images are aligned to the r-band frame, and the residuals are averaged across bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：系统DESJ2032-5658的多波段引力透镜重建示例。每一行对应不同的滤光片——从上到下依次为\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)和\(g\)——最后一行是基于波段归一化数据的合成彩色图像。各列显示：（i）观测数据；（ii）带有红色临界曲线的重建模型图像；（iii）归一化残差，定义为\(({model}-{data})/\sigma\)；（iv）带有白色焦散曲线的源平面重建；以及（v）图像平面中的透镜化源光，也带有红色临界曲线。在每个波段内，数据、模型和透镜化源图像使用一致的颜色标尺，揭示了透镜化源在更蓝波段中日益突出的现象。临界曲线由共享质量模型计算，并利用相对于\(r\)波段推断的相对偏移和旋转，变换到每个波段的帧中。对于合成行，所有图像都配准到\(r\)波段帧，残差在各波段间取平均。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The \(1\sigma\) and \(2\sigma\) posterior distributions of Einstein radius, power law slope, ellipticity parameters, external shear parameters, for DESJ0305-1024. Colored contours show single-band reconstructions ( \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , \(g\) ), which exhibit broad and inconsistent posteriors. The black line shows the joint four-band reconstruction, demonstrating tighter and more stable posteriors.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：DESJ0305-1024的爱因斯坦半径、幂律斜率、椭圆率参数、外部剪切参数的\(1\sigma\)和\(2\sigma\)后验分布。彩色轮廓显示单波段重建（\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)、\(g\)），表现出宽泛且不一致的后验。黑线显示联合四波段重建，展示了更紧凑且更稳定的后验。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Summary of key physics quantities for the full lens system sample. Listed are the target label, deflector redshift \(z_{{lens}}\) (with † indicating spectroscopic values and unmarked values from photometric estimates), right ascension and declination (in degrees), Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\) , mass profile slope \(\gamma^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\) , total projected mass enclosed within the Einstein radius assuming either a fiducial source redshift of \(z_{s}=2\) or the system’s spectroscopic \(z_{s}^{\dagger}\) when available, external shear strength \(\gamma^{\text{\small ext}}\) , and position angles of the lens and shear components. Values with uncertainties are either directly obtained or derived from the posterior distributions, with 68% credible intervals. Spectroscopic redshifts are drawn from the ASTRO 3D Galaxy Evolution with Lenses (AGEL) survey ( tranAGELSurveyStrong2023 ; baroneAGELSurveyData2025 ) . The row highlighted in grey corresponds to the lens model shown in Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：完整透镜系统样本的关键物理量总结。列出目标标签、偏转体红移\(z_{{lens}}\)（†表示光谱值，未标记值来自光度估计）、赤经和赤纬（度）、爱因斯坦半径\(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\)、质量分布斜率\(\gamma^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\)、假设源红移为\(z_{s}=2\)或系统光谱\(z_{s}^{\dagger}\)（若可用）时爱因斯坦半径内的总投影质量、外部剪切强度\(\gamma^{\text{\small ext}}\)，以及透镜和剪切分量的位置角。带不确定性的值直接来自后验分布或由其推导，给出68%置信区间。光谱红移来自ASTRO 3D星系演化与透镜（AGEL）巡天（tranAGELSurveyStrong2023；baroneAGELSurveyData2025）。灰色高亮行对应图2所示的透镜模型。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : The best-fit mass parameters for the DESJ0003 system under three different models, drawn from zeus samples. The number of decimal places for each parameter is chosen to reflect the precision suggested by the 68% credible interval of its posterior distribution. For model with satellite mass (constrianed position), the SIS component’s Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny SIS}}\) has a posterior distribution that peaks near zero, and we report the 84% upper limit, derived from an exponential fit to the posterior.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：DESJ0003系统在三种不同模型下的最佳拟合质量参数，取自zeus样本。每个参数的小数位数根据其后验分布68%置信区间所建议的精度选择。对于带卫星质量（位置受约束）的模型，SIS分量的爱因斯坦半径\(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny SIS}}\)的后验分布峰值接近零，我们报告84%上限，该上限由后验的指数拟合推导得出。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Same as Table 3 , but for the DESJ2125 system. The inclusion of a SIS component significantly improves the fit, with BIC differences of approximately 52 and 76 for Model 2 and Model 3, respectively, relative to Model 1. The inferred external shear correspondingly decreases when the satellite is included, indicating that part of the perturbation previously absorbed by the shear is now attributed to the satellite mass.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：与表3相同，但针对DESJ2125系统。包含SIS分量显著改善了拟合，模型2和模型3相对于模型1的BIC差异分别约为52和76。当包含卫星时，推断的外部剪切相应减小，表明先前被剪切吸收的部分扰动现在归因于卫星质量。

title: Detailed lens modeling and kinematics of the submillimeter galaxy G09v1.97. An analysis of CO, H2O, H2O+, and dust continuum emission
summary: The formation mechanisms of intensely starbursting galaxies at high redshift remain unknown. One possible mechanism for triggering these starbursts is mergers and interactions, but detecting these at high redshift remains a challenge. Observations of high-redshift gravitationally lensed galaxies enable studies of the interstellar medium and environment of these extreme starbursts in detail. We used high angular resolution observations of dust continuum, CO(6-5), H2O(211-202), and H2O+(202-111) emission to constrain the ongoing processes in the z = 3.63 gravitationally lensed submillimeter galaxy H-ATLAS J083051.0+013224 (G09v1.97). We used PyAutoLens to create a de-magnified source plane CO(6-5) emission line cube and performed kinematic modeling using 3DBarolo. Additionally, we investigated the properties of the continuum and molecular line emission in the source plane. We find that the regions of CO(6-5) and H2O(211-202) emission match closely in the source plane but that the dust continuum emission is more compact. We find that our lens modeling results do not require more than one source, contrary to what has been found in previous studies. Instead, we find that G09v1.97 resembles a rotating disk with Vmax/sigma = 2.8 +/- 0.4 with evidence for residual emission indicative of non-circular motions such as outflows, tidal tails, or an additional background galaxy. We suggest that the origin of the non-circular motions may be associated with a bi-conical outflow, a tidal tail from an interaction, or indicate the possible presence of an additional galaxy. We calculate the dynamical mass, gas mass, star-formation rate, and depletion time for G09v1.97 and find a high star-formation rate and low gas depletion time. In combination, this suggests that G09v1.97 has recently undergone an interaction, triggering intense star formation, and is in the process of settling into a disk.

AI.tldr: 对高红移引力透镜星系G09v1.97的多波段观测和运动学建模表明，该星系呈现旋转盘结构而非多源系统，具有高速恒星形成率和短气体耗尽时间，暗示其近期经历了相互作用触发的星暴活动。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移强烈星暴星系的形成机制，特别是通过引力透镜效应详细观测极端星暴星系的星际介质和环境，以探索相互作用和合并是否是其触发机制。
AI.method: 使用高角分辨率观测尘埃连续谱、CO(6-5)、H2O(211-202)和H2O+(202-111)发射线；利用PyAutoLens创建去放大源平面CO(6-5)发射线立方体；使用3DBarolo进行运动学建模；分析源平面连续谱和分子线发射特性。
AI.result: CO(6-5)和H2O(211-202)发射区域在源平面匹配良好，但尘埃连续谱发射更紧凑；透镜建模表明仅需单个源而非多源系统；G09v1.97呈现旋转盘结构(Vmax/σ=2.8±0.4)，存在非圆周运动迹象（可能与双锥外流、潮汐尾或背景星系相关）；计算得到高恒星形成率和短气体耗尽时间。
AI.conclusion: G09v1.97近期经历了相互作用触发了强烈恒星形成，目前正在向盘状结构演化，其高恒星形成率和短气体耗尽时间支持这一演化阶段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移剧烈星暴星系的形成机制仍然未知。触发这些星暴的一种可能机制是合并与相互作用，但在高红移处探测这些过程仍具挑战。对高红移引力透镜星系的观测能够详细研究这些极端星暴的星际介质和环境。我们利用尘埃连续谱、CO(6-5)、H2O(211-202)和H2O+(202-111)发射的高角分辨率观测，来约束红移z = 3.63的引力透镜亚毫米星系H-ATLAS J083051.0+013224 (G09v1.97)中的持续过程。我们使用PyAutoLens创建了去放大源平面的CO(6-5)发射线数据立方体，并利用3DBarolo进行了运动学建模。此外，我们研究了源平面中连续谱和分子线发射的性质。我们发现CO(6-5)和H2O(211-202)发射区域在源平面中紧密匹配，但尘埃连续谱发射更为致密。我们发现透镜建模结果不需要多于一个源，这与先前研究的结果相反。相反，我们发现G09v1.97类似于一个旋转盘，其Vmax/sigma = 2.8 +/- 0.4，并存在指示非圆周运动（如外流、潮汐尾或额外背景星系）的残余发射证据。我们认为非圆周运动的起源可能与双锥外流、相互作用产生的潮汐尾有关，或表明可能存在另一个星系。我们计算了G09v1.97的动力学质量、气体质量、恒星形成率和耗尽时间，发现其恒星形成率高而气体耗尽时间短。综合来看，这表明G09v1.97近期经历了一次相互作用，触发了强烈的恒星形成，并正在向盘状结构演化。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：G09v1.97近期经历了相互作用触发了强烈恒星形成，目前正在向盘状结构演化，其高恒星形成率和短气体耗尽时间支持这一演化阶段。

title: Mirror images of lensed star clusters with mismatched spectral energy distributions: A possible signature of top-heavy stellar initial mass functions and extreme stars in high-redshift star clusters
summary: Strongly lensed star clusters have recently been detected up to redshift $z\approx 10$ in galaxy cluster fields using the James Webb Space Telescope (JWST). When pairs of mirror images of such star clusters appear across the lensing critical curve, it is usually assumed that both images will display identical spectral energy distributions (SEDs). However, this assumption may be invalidated in the presence of gravitational microlensing from stars or other compact objects in the lens, since microlensing will affect the SED contribution from bright stars within the star cluster independently in the two mirror images. Here, we explore under what circumstances mismatched mirror-image SEDs are likely to be observable, and argue that SED differences detectable in JWST observations of lensing-cluster fields will be limited to star clusters of mass $< 10^5\ M_\odot$ and ages $\lesssim 5$ Myr. The probability of severely mismatched mirror-image SEDs increases if the stellar initial mass function is very top-heavy and extends to stellar masses $\gg 100\ M_\odot$, as has been suggested to be the case for Population III stars. The prevalence of lensed star clusters with highly discrepant mirror-image SEDs could therefore serve as a probe of very massive stars and extreme stellar populations in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: 通过JWST观测发现，强引力透镜下的星团镜像图像可能因微引力透镜效应而呈现不同的光谱能量分布，这为探测早期宇宙中的超大质量恒星提供了新方法。

AI.method: 分析微引力透镜对星团镜像图像光谱能量分布的影响条件，确定JWST可观测到SED差异的星团质量和年龄范围，并探讨不同恒星初始质量函数的影响。
AI.result: JWST观测中可检测到SED差异的星团质量需小于10^5太阳质量且年龄小于500万年；若恒星初始质量函数偏向大质量恒星（如第三星族），镜像图像SED差异会更显著。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜星团最近在星系团场中被詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）探测到，红移高达$z\approx 10$。当此类星团的镜像图像对出现在透镜临界曲线两侧时，通常假设两个图像将显示相同的光谱能量分布（SED）。然而，如果透镜中存在来自恒星或其他致密天体的引力微透镜效应，这一假设可能失效，因为微透镜会独立影响两个镜像图像中星团内明亮恒星的SED贡献。本文探讨了在何种情况下镜像图像SED不匹配可能被观测到，并论证在JWST对透镜星系团场的观测中，可探测的SED差异仅限于质量$< 10^5\ M_\odot$且年龄$\lesssim 5$ Myr的星团。如果恒星初始质量函数非常顶部沉重且延伸至恒星质量$\gg 100\ M_\odot$（如对第三族恒星所提出的情况），则严重不匹配的镜像图像SED的概率会增加。因此，具有高度不一致镜像图像SED的透镜星团的普遍性可作为早期宇宙中极大质量恒星和极端恒星群体的探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜星团镜像图像的光谱能量分布差异可作为探测早期宇宙中超大质量恒星和极端恒星群体的有效工具，为理解早期宇宙恒星形成提供新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic illustration of the mechanism by which mirror images of star cluster may develop mismatched SEDs. Left: A star cluster featuring a small number of red, evolved stars (here just one; red circle) and a larger number of blue stars (for illustrative purposes just three; blue circles) is located close to the macrolensing caustic in the source plane. Right: In the image plane, the light from the blue and red stars blends into two unresolved star cluster macroimages (green circles) located symmetrically on either side of the critical curve (a third image is also formed directly on the critical curve, but is highly demagnified and not shown). In the case of macrolensing only, the two star cluster images contain the highly stretched images of each star, appearing as mirror-flipped versions of each other. Microlensing by stars or other compact objects (black circles) located in the galaxy cluster that acts as the macrolens distort the magnification of individual stars within the two star cluster images. Due to the separation of the star cluster macroimages in the image plane (typically \(\approx 0.1\) –1 arcsec), different compact objects microlens the two sets of stellar images independently, which can alter the balance of red to blue light between the two unresolved star cluster images.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：星团镜像图像可能产生不匹配SED的机制示意图。左图：一个包含少量红色演化恒星（此处仅一颗；红色圆圈）和大量蓝色恒星（为示意仅三颗；蓝色圆圈）的星团位于源平面中的宏透镜焦散线附近。右图：在像平面中，来自蓝色和红色恒星的光混合成两个未分辨的星团宏像（绿色圆圈），对称地位于临界曲线两侧（第三个像也直接形成于临界曲线上，但高度缩小，未显示）。在仅考虑宏透镜的情况下，两个星团像包含每颗恒星高度拉伸的像，呈现为镜像翻转版本。位于作为宏透镜的星系团中的恒星或其他致密天体（黑色圆圈）引起的微透镜会扭曲两个星团像内单个恒星的放大率。由于星团宏像在像平面中的分离（通常\(\approx 0.1\) –1角秒），不同的致密天体独立地对两组恒星像进行微透镜，从而可能改变两个未分辨星团像之间红蓝光的平衡。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Macro- and microlensing of stars within a \(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at a distance of 10 pc from the macrolensing caustic. a) Projected spatial distribution of the \(\geq 10\ M_{\odot}\) stars (blue dots) with respect to the caustic (dashed black line). b) Magnification distribution for stars within a single macroimage of the star cluster, when placed at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 in microlenses in the \(z_{{l}}=0.5\) lens plane: positive-parity image (blue line), negative-parity image (red line), macrolensing only (black line, same for positive/negative parity). Stars to the left of the caustic in panel do not produce counterimages and are not included here. Due to gravitational microlensing, both the positive- and negative parity distributions are wider than the distribution due to macrolensing only. Compared to the positive-parity distribution, the negative-parity probabiliity distribution exhibits a prominent tail to very low magnifications, but also a subtle boost of the probabilities for very high magnifications.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：距离宏透镜焦散线10 pc的\(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)星团内恒星的宏透镜和微透镜。a) \(\geq 10\ M_{\odot}\)恒星（蓝点）相对于焦散线（黑色虚线）的投影空间分布。b) 假设在\(z_{{l}}=0.5\)透镜平面中微透镜的\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2时，位于\(z=6\)的星团单个宏像内恒星的放大率分布：正宇称像（蓝线），负宇称像（红线），仅宏透镜（黑线，正/负宇称相同）。面板中焦散线左侧的恒星不产生对应像，此处未包含。由于引力微透镜，正宇称和负宇称分布均比仅宏透镜的分布更宽。与正宇称分布相比，负宇称概率分布表现出向极低放大率的显著尾部，但也存在极高放大率概率的微妙提升。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The photometric evolution in JWST/NIRCam bands of the star light from a young, unlensed \(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) , \(Z=0.002\) single-age star cluster at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of a fully-sampled Kroupa ( 2001 ) IMF from 0.1–120 \(M_{\odot}\) : a) Brightness evolution in filters F115W, F200W and F444W as a function of age; b) JWST/NIRcam SEDs at ages 1, 3, 10 and 20 Myr. The contribution from evolved, red stars is seen as an upturn in the SEDs for wavelengths above 2 \(\mu\) m at ages 3 Myr and above.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：假设完全采样的Kroupa (2001) IMF（0.1–120 \(M_{\odot}\)），在\(z=6\)处年轻、未透镜的\(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)、\(Z=0.002\)单一年龄星团星光在JWST/NIRCam波段的光度演化：a) 滤光片F115W、F200W和F444W的亮度随年龄的变化；b) 年龄为1、3、10和20 Myr时的JWST/NIRcam SED。演化恒星（红色）的贡献表现为年龄3 Myr及以上时波长超过2 \(\mu\) m的SED上升。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Discrepant SEDs of star cluster mirror images at \(z=6\) , formed by \(Z=0.002\) star clusters at 10 pc from the macrocaustic and affected by \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 microlensing. a) Examples of JWST/NIRCam SEDs of positive (blue line) and negative-parity (red line) mirror images of a \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at ages 3 and 20 Myr. The black line shows the corresponding SEDs predicted by macrolensing alone (the same for both mirror images). b) Variation in \(m_{115}-m_{444}\) colour between positive- and negative-parity images ( \(\Delta(m_{115}-m_{444})=(m_{115}-m_{444})^{+}-(m_{115}-m_{444})^{-}\) ), as a function of the F200W apparent magnitude of the positive-parity image ( \(m_{200}^{+}\) ), for star clusters with total masses \(1\times 10^{4}\) (red circles), \(3\times 10^{4}\) (orange circles), \(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) (green circles) at ages 3 and 20 Myr. Every differently cloud of points correspond to 100 Monte Carlo realizations. The colour differences between the mirror images are seen to be larger at 3 Myr than at 20 Myr (please note the different y-axis limits in panel b). At fixed age, the colour differences between the mirror images is also seen to become larger for lower-mass star clusters, while at the same time occurring at fainter overall SED magnitudes (F200W + ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：\(z=6\)处星团镜像图像的不一致SED，由距离宏焦散线10 pc的\(Z=0.002\)星团形成，并受\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2微透镜影响。a) 年龄为3和20 Myr时，\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团正宇称（蓝线）和负宇称（红线）镜像图像的JWST/NIRCam SED示例。黑线显示仅宏透镜预测的相应SED（两个镜像图像相同）。b) 正宇称和负宇称图像之间\(m_{115}-m_{444}\)颜色的变化（\(\Delta(m_{115}-m_{444})=(m_{115}-m_{444})^{+}-(m_{115}-m_{444})^{-}\)），作为正宇称图像F200W视星等（\(m_{200}^{+}\)）的函数，针对总质量为\(1\times 10^{4}\)（红圈）、\(3\times 10^{4}\)（橙圈）、\(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿圈）的星团，年龄为3和20 Myr。每个不同的点云对应100次蒙特卡洛实现。镜像图像之间的颜色差异在3 Myr时比20 Myr时更大（请注意面板b中y轴范围不同）。在固定年龄下，镜像图像之间的颜色差异也随星团质量降低而增大，同时整体SED星等（F200W + ）更暗。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Median absolute colour difference between the F115W and F444W filters for mirror images of young \(Z=0.002\) , \(z=6\) star clusters affected by microlensing with \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 , as a function of the median apparent F200W flux of the positive-parity star cluster image. Models for star clusters of mass \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (red circles), \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (orange squares) and \(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) (green triangles) are shown at ages 3, 5, 10 and 20 Myr (from right to left). The dashed line indicates the part of the diagram where we consider that colour differences may be detectable in JWST observations of cluster-lens fields (see main text for details). For star clusters in the mass range \(1\times 10^{4}\) – \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) , the median colour difference is in the observable range for ages \(\approx 3\) –5 Myr.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：受微透镜影响的年轻\(Z=0.002\)、\(z=6\)星团镜像图像在F115W和F444W滤光片之间的中位绝对颜色差异，作为正宇称星团像中位视F200W通量的函数，微透镜参数\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2。显示了质量\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（红圈）、\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（橙方块）和\(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿三角）的星团模型，年龄为3、5、10和20 Myr（从右到左）。虚线表示我们认为颜色差异在JWST对星团透镜场观测中可能可探测的区域（详见正文）。对于质量范围\(1\times 10^{4}\) – \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)的星团，中位颜色差异在年龄\(\approx 3\) –5 Myr时处于可观测范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Photometric evolution in JWST/NIRCam filters F115W, F200W and F444W of the star light from a young, unlensed \(10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) , Pop III single-age star cluster at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of a fully-sampled log-flat IMF from 2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) . At ages \(\approx 1\) –2 Myr, the star cluster becomes very bright in the F444W band as stars in the 300–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) mass range reach \(T_{{eff}}<2\times 10^{4}\) K states at the end of their lives.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：假设完全采样的对数平坦IMF（2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)），在\(z=6\)处年轻、未透镜的\(10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)、第三族单一年龄星团星光在JWST/NIRCam滤光片F115W、F200W和F444W中的光度演化。在年龄\(\approx 1\) –2 Myr时，星团在F444W波段变得非常明亮，因为质量范围300–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)的恒星在其生命末期达到\(T_{{eff}}<2\times 10^{4}\) K状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Discrepant mirror image SEDs for \(z=6\) Pop III star clusters with a log-flat IMF throughout the 2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) mass range. Left: Examples of JWST/NIRCam SEDs of positive (blue line) and negative-parity (red line) mirror images of a \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at ages 1.5 and 2.0 Myr. The black line shows the corresponding SEDs predicted by macrolensing alone (the same for both mirror images). Right: Median absolute colour difference between the F115W and F444W filters for mirror images as a function of the median apparent F200W flux of the positive-parity star cluster image. Models for star clusters of mass \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) (red circles), \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (orange squares) and \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (green triangles) are shown at ages 1.5, 2.0 and 3.0 Myr (from right to left), in relation to the part of the diagram (dashed line) where we consider colour differences to be detectable. For \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star clusters, discrepant SEDs in the detectable regime are produced at 1.5–3.0 Myr, whereas lower-mass star clusters ( \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) and \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) ) only produce discrepant SEDs during a fraction of this age span. At median \(m_{200}^{+} 5 ). The behaviour of the \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) models at 2–3 Myr (very faint, with small SED difference between mirror images) is caused by IMF sampling effects due to the small number of stars present within such star clusters.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：\(z=6\)第三族星团（对数平坦IMF，质量范围2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)）的不一致镜像图像SED。左图：年龄为1.5和2.0 Myr时，\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团正宇称（蓝线）和负宇称（红线）镜像图像的JWST/NIRCam SED示例。黑线显示仅宏透镜预测的相应SED（两个镜像图像相同）。右图：镜像图像在F115W和F444W滤光片之间的中位绝对颜色差异，作为正宇称星团像中位视F200W通量的函数。显示了质量\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)（红圈）、\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（橙方块）和\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿三角）的星团模型，年龄为1.5、2.0和3.0 Myr（从右到左），相对于我们认为颜色差异可探测的区域（虚线）。对于\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团，在1.5–3.0 Myr时产生可探测范围内的一致SED，而较低质量星团（\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)和\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)）仅在此年龄跨度的一部分时间内产生不一致SED。在中位\(m_{200}^{+} 5 )时，\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)模型在2–3 Myr时的行为（非常暗，镜像图像间SED差异小）是由IMF采样效应引起的，因为此类星团中恒星数量较少。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Relative contributions from stars of different masses to the integrated light in the JWST/NIRCam F115W (blue), F200W (green) and F444W (red) filters, in the case of a \(z=6\) star cluster with a standard, fully-sampled IMF, at ages 1 Myr (left) and 3 Myr (right)
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在\(z=6\)星团（标准、完全采样IMF）情况下，不同质量恒星对JWST/NIRCam滤光片F115W（蓝）、F200W（绿）和F444W（红）积分光的相对贡献，年龄为1 Myr（左）和3 Myr（右）。

title: MUSE-ALMA Haloes XIII. Molecular gas in $z \sim 0.5$ HI-selected galaxies
comment: 17 pages, 7 figures. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: We present new results from the MUSE-ALMA Haloes survey, covering 79 galaxies associated with strong HI absorption at redshift about 0.5. Our ALMA Cycle 10 observations add 39 systems to the initial 21, bringing the total to 60 galaxies. CO emission is detected in 9 new galaxies, and in 12 of 60 total, doubling the number of CO-emitting HI-selected galaxies and probing 1.2 dex deeper in molecular gas mass than previous studies. These galaxies span a wide range of stellar masses and metallicities. By comparing CO(2-1) and CO(3-2) properties with star formation rates and gas-phase metallicities from VLT/MUSE and HST, we find a dual behaviour in star formation efficiency: low-mass systems follow main-sequence scaling relations, while high-mass systems show suppressed star formation. This diversity indicates that HI absorbers trace both evolved and younger galaxies, providing a key step toward completing the baryon census at redshift about 0.5.

AI.tldr: MUSE-ALMA Haloes调查新增39个星系，共60个与强HI吸收相关的星系，在9个新星系中探测到CO发射，将CO发射的HI选择星系数量翻倍，分子气体质量探测深度提高1.2个数量级。
AI.motivation: 研究红移约0.5处与强HI吸收相关的星系，通过扩展样本和更深的分子气体探测，完善该红移处的重子物质普查。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Cycle 10观测新增39个系统，结合VLT/MUSE和HST数据，比较CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)特性与恒星形成率、气体相金属丰度。
AI.result: 在60个星系中，12个探测到CO发射；发现恒星形成效率的双重行为：低质量系统遵循主序标度关系，而高质量系统显示受抑制的恒星形成。
AI.conclusion: HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出关键一步。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天的新结果，涵盖了79个与红移约0.5处强HI吸收相关的星系。我们的ALMA第10周期观测在最初的21个系统基础上新增了39个，使总数达到60个星系。在9个新星系中探测到CO发射，总计60个星系中有12个探测到CO，使CO发射的HI选择星系数量翻倍，并且分子气体质量的探测深度比以往研究深1.2 dex。这些星系跨越了广泛的恒星质量和金属丰度范围。通过将CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)性质与来自VLT/MUSE和HST的恒星形成速率及气相金属丰度进行比较，我们发现恒星形成效率存在双重行为：低质量系统遵循主序标度关系，而高质量系统则表现出恒星形成受抑制。这种多样性表明HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出了关键一步。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出关键一步。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of CO-detections (blue) and non-CO-detections (light blue) on galaxies as a function of redshift (left) and stellar mass (middle). The right panel is plotted as a function of metallicity corresponding to multiple galaxies associated with the absorbers (Halley et al., in prep). This figure represents the MUSE-ALMA Haloes survey, including all the sources from the new ALMA Large Program and previous ALMA data (see Section 2.2 ). The middle and right panels have fewer numbers because only those with reliable \(M_{\star}\) and [M/H] determinations are included. The median values for the detections are 0.6, 9.66 and \(-1.23\) for the redshift, stellar mass and absorption metallicity, while the non-detections have median values of 0.5, 9.16, and \(-1.84\) . Overall, we report no clear correlation between the detection rate and any of these properties, suggesting that the detection of CO emission may be governed by a combination of global galaxy properties, rather than just one property alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CO探测（蓝色）和非CO探测（浅蓝色）星系作为红移（左）和恒星质量（中）函数的分布。右图绘制了与吸收体相关的多个星系的金属丰度函数（Halley et al., in prep）。此图展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天，包括来自新ALMA大型计划及先前ALMA数据的所有源（见第2.2节）。中图和右图数量较少，因为仅包含具有可靠\(M_{\star}\)和[M/H]测定的星系。探测的中位值分别为红移0.6、恒星质量9.66和吸收金属丰度\(-1.23\)，而非探测的中位值为0.5、9.16和\(-1.84\)。总体而言，我们未发现探测率与这些性质中的任何一个存在明确相关性，这表明CO发射的探测可能由星系整体性质的组合决定，而非单一性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: CO detections and spectral profiles of the new nine detected sources. Left panels show the moment zero maps with the \(\pm\) 3, \(\pm\) 4, and \(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\) level contours, while the right panels display the extracted CO spectra. The grey shaded regions around each spectrum represent the \(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS noise level estimate from the individual data cubes, and the blue shaded region indicates the velocity range used to create the moment maps. The final row, right figure, presents the rest-frame stacked spectrum of non-detections with \(\pm 1\sigma\) and \(\pm 2\sigma\) levels. A summary of the integrated CO fluxes and associated uncertainties for all detected sources is provided in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：新探测到的九个源的CO探测和光谱轮廓。左图显示零阶矩图，带有\(\pm\) 3、\(\pm\) 4和\(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\)等值线，右图显示提取的CO光谱。每个光谱周围的灰色阴影区域表示来自单个数据立方体的\(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS噪声水平估计，蓝色阴影区域表示用于创建矩图的速度范围。最后一行右图显示了非探测的静止帧叠加光谱，带有\(\pm 1\sigma\)和\(\pm 2\sigma\)水平。所有探测源的积分CO通量及相关不确定性的总结见表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Different \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) models across varying metallicites. In this work, we adopt the model proposed by Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) , shown in the blue points, which corresponds to the geometric mean of the prescriptions of Bolatto et al. ( 2013 ) and Genzel et al. ( 2012 ) , as indicated in Eq. 3 . As a reference, we also include the model proposed by Accurso et al. ( 2017 ) , which would lead to higher values for \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) for the galaxies in our sample. To prevent extrapolation into poorly constrained regions of parameter space, we impose an upper limit on \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) , set to the lowest emission metallicity measured in our sample, which leads to an \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同金属丰度下的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)模型。在本工作中，我们采用Genzel等人（2015）提出的模型，以蓝点表示，该模型对应于Bolatto等人（2013）和Genzel等人（2012）方案的几何平均值，如公式3所示。作为参考，我们还包含了Accurso等人（2017）提出的模型，该模型会导致我们样本中星系的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)值更高。为避免外推到参数空间约束较差的区域，我们对\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)设置了一个上限，设定为我们样本中测得的最低发射金属丰度，这导致\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: Molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ) as a function of H i column density ( \(N_{\text{HI}}\) ). Blue circles represent our sample in comparison with previous studies on H i -absorption selected systems from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 , shown in grey. Right: \(N_{\text{HI}}\) and impact parameter, colour coded by the molecular gas masses. In this plot, we include all impact parameters for the sources in our sample, rather than limiting to the smallest \(b\) as done in previous studies (e.g. perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016 ; Hamanowicz et al. 2020 ; wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022 ) . The circles represent CO detections, and the triangle represents non-CO detections. We also include the median radial profiles for the neutral hydrogen column density from the simulations by voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019 and nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020 in the dashed and dotted lines, respectively. We report no clear correlation between the column density and impact parameter for different molecular gas masses.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左：分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）作为HI柱密度（\(N_{\text{HI}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈代表我们的样本，与来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的先前HI吸收选择系统研究（灰色）进行比较。右：\(N_{\text{HI}}\)和碰撞参数，按分子气体质量着色。在此图中，我们包含了样本中所有源的碰撞参数，而非像先前研究（例如perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016；Hamanowicz et al. 2020；wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022）那样仅限于最小的\(b\)。圆圈代表CO探测，三角形代表非CO探测。我们还分别以虚线和点线形式包含了来自voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019和nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020模拟的中性氢柱密度中值径向轮廓。我们未报告不同分子气体质量的柱密度与碰撞参数之间存在明确相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: Star formation rate (SFR) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Right: Stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Our sample is shown in blue circles, and the blue arrows represent a \(3\sigma\) upper limit. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. We also include the mean dust correction for SFR depicted by a large blue arrow on the corner of the left panel. For comparison, we include data from the xCOLD GASS survey ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ) , which represents low-redshift galaxies, and the PHIBSS survey ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) , in the redshift range \(z\sim 0.3-1.2\) . The solid line represents the molecular gas main sequence scaling relation from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 . We also included estimates from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 in both panels, labelled as other H i –selected systems. Our sources with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 0.3\) dex above the expected SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) relations for ‘normal star-forming galaxies’ at the same redshift range, while the systems with with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 1.5\) dex below the relation. This trend suggests that H i –selected systems have a dual behaviour. Galaxies with low molecular gas masses form stars efficiently, following both the depletion timescales and the \(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) scaling relations of main-sequence galaxies. In contrast, galaxies with high molecular gas masses show inefficient star formation and fall below the expected stellar mass growth, likely because they are still actively accreting gas from the intergalactic medium or interacting within group environments. These systems appear not yet to have reached the equilibrium conditions characteristic of main-sequence galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左：恒星形成速率（SFR）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。右：恒星质量（\(M_{\star}\)）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。我们的样本以蓝色圆圈显示，蓝色箭头表示\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。我们还包含了左图角落处一个大蓝色箭头所示的SFR平均尘埃校正。作为比较，我们包含了代表低红移星系的xCOLD GASS巡天（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017）和红移范围\(z\sim 0.3-1.2\)的PHIBSS巡天（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的数据。实线代表来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的分子气体主序标度关系。我们还在两个面板中包含了来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的估计，标记为其他HI选择系统。我们的\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\)的源位于相同红移范围内“正常恒星形成星系”的预期SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)关系之上约\(\sim 0.3\) dex，而\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\)的系统位于该关系之下约\(\sim 1.5\) dex。这一趋势表明HI选择系统具有双重行为。分子气体质量低的星系高效形成恒星，遵循主序星系的耗尽时标和\(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)标度关系。相比之下，分子气体质量高的星系表现出低效的恒星形成，并低于预期的恒星质量增长，这可能是因为它们仍在从星系际介质活跃吸积气体或在群环境中相互作用。这些系统似乎尚未达到主序星系特征的平衡条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Nebular emission metallicity, \(12+\log\) (O/H) ( wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023 ) , as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{{H}_{2}}\) ) for our H i –selected galaxies. Blue circles indicate CO detections, and blue leftward arrows show \(3\sigma\) upper limits for CO non-detections. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid line indicates the mass-metallicity relation from Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) for the PHIBSS sample ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . A positive correlation emerges between metallicity and CO detectability, with CO-detected galaxies tending to occupy the higher-metallicity regime ( \(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\) ), as found previously in many studies (e.g., Bolatto et al. 2013 ) . Right: Histogram of emission metallicities for all galaxies, with CO detections in blue and non-detections in light blue filled histogram. The dashed orange line indicates a metallicity \(\log Z\sim 8.5\) , which sets the higher and lower metallicity regimes discussed in Sect. 5 . Although the distributions overlap significantly, a two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test yields a p-value of 0.004, indicating a statistically significant difference in the underlying metallicity distributions. This reinforces the interpretation that metallicity plays a key role in governing the observability of molecular gas in H i –selected systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左：我们HI选择星系的星云发射金属丰度\(12+\log\) (O/H)（wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈表示CO探测，蓝色左向箭头表示CO非探测的\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。实线表示来自Genzel等人（2015）的PHIBSS样本（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的质量-金属丰度关系。金属丰度与CO可探测性之间呈现正相关，CO探测星系倾向于占据较高金属丰度区域（\(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\)），这与先前许多研究（例如Bolatto et al. 2013）的发现一致。右：所有星系的发射金属丰度直方图，CO探测以蓝色填充，非探测以浅蓝色填充。橙色虚线表示金属丰度\(\log Z\sim 8.5\)，这设定了第5节讨论的高和低金属丰度区域。尽管分布显著重叠，双样本Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验得出p值为0.004，表明底层金属丰度分布存在统计显著差异。这强化了金属丰度在控制HI选择系统中分子气体可观测性方面起关键作用的解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Molecular gas depletion time ( \(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\) ) as a function of redshift for our H i –selected sample (blue/light-blue circles for high/low molecular gas mass systems), compares with literature scaling relations and emission-selected samples ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ; tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid red curve shows the empirically derived \(t_{\text{dep}}\) evolution for main-sequence galaxies from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 , the dotted line marks the Hubble time at each redshift, the thin solid line represents the stellar mass doubling time ( \(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\) ) from tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020 , and the purple dashed line is from the cosmic depletion timescales derived from the ALMACAL survey (Bollo et al. 2025 ) . H i –selected galaxies, both from our sample and from high-redshift literature sources (gray dots; klitschH2MolecularGas2021 ; neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018 ; neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020 ; neelemanII158Mm2025 ; Fynbo et al. 2018 ; kanekarHighMolecularGas2020 ; kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 ; kaurMassiveDustyHi2022 ; kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025 ), consistently lie above the main-sequence relation, indicating lower star formation efficiencies. Several galaxies exhibit \(t_{\text{dep}}\) approaching or exceeding the Hubble time, suggesting inefficient molecular gas consumption or suppressed star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：我们HI选择样本（高/低分子气体质量系统分别用蓝色/浅蓝色圆圈表示）的分子气体耗尽时标（\(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\)）作为红移的函数，与文献标度关系和发射选择样本（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017；tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）进行比较。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。红色实线曲线显示了来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的主序星系经验推导的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)演化，点线标记每个红移处的哈勃时间，细实线代表来自tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020的恒星质量倍增时间（\(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\)），紫色虚线来自ALMACAL巡天（Bollo et al. 2025）推导的宇宙耗尽时标。HI选择星系，无论是来自我们的样本还是高红移文献源（灰点；klitschH2MolecularGas2021；neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018；neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020；neelemanII158Mm2025；Fynbo et al. 2018；kanekarHighMolecularGas2020；kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018；kaurMassiveDustyHi2022；kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025），始终位于主序关系之上，表明恒星形成效率较低。几个星系的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)接近或超过哈勃时间，表明分子气体消耗低效或恒星形成受抑制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Detections. Measured properties of the new nine detected sources from the MUSE-ALMA Haloes ALMA Large Program. 1 1 1 \(b\) is the impact parameter, and \(F_{{peak}}\) is the measured peak flux
figures.caption_zh: 表1：探测。来自MUSE-ALMA Haloes ALMA大型计划的新探测到的九个源的测量性质。\(b\)是碰撞参数，\(F_{{peak}}\)是测得的峰值通量。

title: New CDM Crisis Revealed by Multi-Scale Cluster Lensing
summary: The properties of substructure in galaxy clusters, exquisitely probed by gravitational lensing, offer a stringent test of dark matter models. Combining strong and weak lensing data for massive clusters, we map their total mass--dominated by dark matter--over the dynamic range needed to confront small-scale predictions for collisionless cold dark matter (CDM). Using state-of-the-art lens models, we extract four key subhalo properties: the mass function, projected radial distribution, internal density profile, and tidal truncation radius. We find that the subhalo mass function and truncation radii are consistent with CDM expectations. In contrast, the inner density profiles and radial distribution of subhalos are strongly discrepant with CDM. The incidence of galaxy-galaxy strong lensing (GGSL) from subhalo cores exceeds CDM predictions by nearly an order of magnitude, requiring inner density slopes as steep as $γ\gtrsim 2.5$ within $r \lesssim 0.01\,R_{200}$ consistent with core-collapsed self-interacting dark matter (SIDM), while the same subhalos behave as collisionless in their outskirts. Additionally, the observed radial distribution of subhalos hosting bright cluster member galaxies, explicitly modeled in the lens reconstructions, remains incompatible with CDM. Together, these small-scale stress tests reveal an intriguing paradox and challenge the dark matter microphysics of purely collisionless CDM and motivate hybrid scenarios, such as a dual-component model with both CDM and SIDM, or entirely new classes of dark matter theories.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团中次结构性质通过引力透镜效应得到精细探测，为暗物质模型提供了严格检验。结合强透镜和弱透镜数据，我们对大质量星系团的总质量（主要由暗物质主导）进行了成像，覆盖了与无碰撞冷暗物质（CDM）小尺度预言进行对比所需的动态范围。利用最先进的透镜模型，我们提取了四个关键次晕性质：质量函数、投影径向分布、内部密度轮廓和潮汐截断半径。我们发现次晕质量函数和截断半径与CDM预期一致。相反，次晕的内部密度轮廓和径向分布与CDM存在强烈差异。来自次晕核心的星系-星系强透镜（GGSL）发生率超出CDM预言近一个数量级，要求内部密度斜率在$r \lesssim 0.01\,R_{200}$内陡峭至$\gamma\gtrsim 2.5$，这与核心坍缩的自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）一致，而相同的次晕在其外围表现为无碰撞。此外，在透镜重建中明确建模的、承载明亮星系团成员星系的次晕的观测径向分布仍与CDM不相容。总之，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了一个有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞CDM的暗物质微观物理，并激发了混合场景，例如包含CDM和SIDM的双组分模型，或全新类别的暗物质理论。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞冷暗物质的微观物理，并支持混合模型（如CDM+SIDM双组分模型）或全新类别的暗物质理论。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The mass function of subhalos associated with spectroscopically confirmed bright cluster member galaxies in observed lensing clusters ( Lenstool , color-shaded) compared with CDM predictions from simulated analogs (TNG-C, solid lines) under the same selection criteria; see Section IV for details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在观测透镜星系团中（Lenstool，彩色阴影），与光谱确认的明亮星系团成员星系相关的次晕质量函数，与模拟类似物（TNG-C，实线）在相同选择标准下的CDM预言比较；详见第四节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top: the projected radial distribution of subhalos associated with spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies in observed clusters (color-shaded) and in simulated analogs (solid lines; averaged over the five best-matched analogs and over three random projections). Bottom: the projected spatial distribution of subhalos around cluster centers in observations (left) and simulated analogs (right; from the best-mass-matched analog along a random projection), annotated by the respective absolute magnitude of associated galaxies. As compared to the observations, the simulated analogs clearly show a dearth of and fail to reproduce the spatial clustering of inner substructures within \(R/R_{200}\lesssim 0.2\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上：观测星系团中（彩色阴影）与光谱确认的成员星系相关的次晕投影径向分布，以及模拟类似物中的分布（实线；取五个最佳匹配类似物和三个随机投影的平均值）。下：观测（左）和模拟类似物（右；来自最佳质量匹配类似物的随机投影）中星系团中心周围次晕的投影空间分布，并标注了相关星系的绝对星等。与观测相比，模拟类似物明显缺乏且未能再现\(R/R_{200}\lesssim 0.2\)内内部次结构的空间聚集。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Tidal radii from lensing-based observational inferences (gray line; the shading indicates conservative \(5\sigma\) uncertainties), overlaid with individual CDM (blue horizontal dashes) and strongly collisional SIDM (red horizontal dashes; conservative upper bounds) predictions for all spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies in our sample. We also plot the respective medians (circles), central 68% ranges (triangles), and central 95% ranges (horizontal bars). Lensing inferences are fully statistically consistent with CDM and discrepant with SIDM.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：基于透镜的观测推断的潮汐半径（灰线；阴影表示保守的\(5\sigma\)不确定性），叠加了样本中所有光谱确认成员星系的单个CDM（蓝色水平虚线）和强碰撞SIDM（红色水平虚线；保守上限）预言。我们还绘制了各自的中位数（圆圈）、中心68%范围（三角形）和中心95%范围（水平条）。透镜推断在统计上与CDM完全一致，而与SIDM不一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Schematic illustrating the implications for CDM and SIDM models. Left: collisionless CDM matches subhalo tidal extents but severely underpredicts GGSL. Right: core-collapsed SIDM yields steep inner profiles that match GGSL, but this strongly collisional regime also results in more pronounced mass stripping that significantly reduces tidal extents, even after accounting for the slight expansion of the outskirts due to outward energy transfer during the core collapsing. The inset axes show the run of \(\log\rho\) versus \(\log r\) (not to scale).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：说明对CDM和SIDM模型影响的示意图。左：无碰撞CDM匹配次晕潮汐范围，但严重低估了GGSL。右：核心坍缩SIDM产生匹配GGSL的陡峭内部轮廓，但这种强碰撞状态也导致更显著的质量剥离，显著减小了潮汐范围，即使在考虑了核心坍缩过程中由于向外能量转移导致的外围轻微膨胀之后。插图坐标轴显示了\(\log\rho\)与\(\log r\)的关系（未按比例）。

figures.caption_en: Figure A1: Left: 3D radial distribution of the subhalos in our TNG-C cluster analogs (dashed, color-coded as indicated) compared to the force-disruption-free benchmark taken from Hopkins et al. 2023 (black solid). We show the cumulative number of all subhalos with more than 20 DM particles, normalized to the total number within the respective \(2R_{200}\) . To explicitly account for the artificial disruption of the inner subhalos, we artificially “inject” subhalos within \(0.5R_{200}\) by sampling weighted by the deficit within \(0.5R_{200}\) between the TNG-C and benchmark cumulative distributions (see the text for details). Three random examples of such modified subhalo radial distributions (dotted) are plotted that well match the benchmark distribution. Right: projected radial distribution of the subhalos hosting member galaxies in observed clusters (color-shaded, as in the top panel of Figure 2 ) and in simulated analogs with injected inner subhalos. The solid (dotted) lines show the mean ( \(1\sigma\) confidence interval) inferred from 1 million bootstrapping iterations. Within the projected radius of \(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\) , individual radial bins remain \(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\) discrepant with the observed abundance, even after explicitly accounting for numerical uncertainties due to artificial disruption.
figures.caption_zh: 图A1：左：TNG-C星系团类似物中次晕的3D径向分布（虚线，按指示颜色编码），与取自Hopkins等人2023年的无力瓦解基准（黑色实线）比较。我们展示了所有包含超过20个暗物质粒子的次晕的累积数量，归一化到各自\(2R_{200}\)内的总数。为了明确考虑内部次晕的人为瓦解，我们通过在\(0.5R_{200}\)内按TNG-C与基准累积分布之间的差值（详见正文）加权采样，人为“注入”\(0.5R_{200}\)内的次晕。绘制了三个这样的修正次晕径向分布（虚线）的随机示例，它们与基准分布匹配良好。右：观测星系团中（彩色阴影，如图2上图）和具有注入内部次晕的模拟类似物中承载成员星系的次晕的投影径向分布。实线（虚线）显示了从100万次自助抽样迭代推断的平均值（\(1\sigma\)置信区间）。在投影半径\(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\)内，即使在明确考虑了由于人为瓦解导致的数值不确定性之后，单个径向区间仍与观测丰度存在\(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\)的差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure A2: Ratios of subhalo tidal radii computed from CDM–SIDM-matched pairs of the L-Cluster run of the SIDM Concerto suite (Nadler et al. , 2025 ) that assumes a Rutherford-like velocity-dependent cross-section model (see the text for details). We show the mean (diamonds), central 68% (triangles), and central 95% (horizontal bars) ranges of each distribution under no subhalo selection (gray) and as selected by instantaneous halocentric radius (purple) or bound mass fraction (red). This comparison is done for the entire CDM–SIDM-matched subhalo sample (left) and for the subsample filtered by requiring the mass-resolution-limited numerical scatter in the bound mass fraction to be less than 0.3 dex (right; Equation ( C1 )). Even in the mildly collisional regime or with velocity-dependent SIDM models, self-interaction-driven core formation leads to substantially higher tidal mass loss and tidal truncation radii statistically discrepant from CDM predictions, by up to an order of magnitude for inner and/or heavily stripped subhalos.
figures.caption_zh: 图A2：从SIDM Concerto套件（Nadler等人，2025）的L-Cluster运行中，假设类卢瑟福速度依赖截面模型（详见正文）的CDM–SIDM匹配对计算的次晕潮汐半径比率。我们展示了在无次晕选择（灰色）以及按瞬时晕心半径（紫色）或束缚质量分数（红色）选择下，每个分布的平均值（菱形）、中心68%（三角形）和中心95%（水平条）范围。此比较针对整个CDM–SIDM匹配次晕样本（左）和通过要求束缚质量分数的质量分辨率限制数值散射小于0.3 dex（右；方程(C1)）过滤的子样本进行。即使在弱碰撞状态或使用速度依赖SIDM模型时，自相互作用驱动的核心形成也会导致显著更高的潮汐质量损失和潮汐截断半径，在统计上与CDM预言不一致，对于内部和/或严重剥离的次晕，差异可达一个数量级。

title: Fast rotations in galaxies at cosmic noon indicate central concentration of stars, dark matter or massive black holes
summary: The rotation curves of regularly rotating disc galaxies are a unique probe of the gravitational potential and dark matter distribution. Until recently, matter decomposition of rotation curves at $z>0.5$ was challenging, not only due to the lack of high resolution kinematic data but also of both suitable photometry to accurately trace the stellar surface density and spatially-resolved sub-mm observations to trace the cold gas distribution. In this paper, we analyse three galaxies from the Archival Large Program to Advance Kinematic Analysis (ALPAKA) sample, combining highly resolved cold gas observations from ALMA with rest-frame near-infrared imaging from JWST to investigate their dynamical properties and constrain their dark matter halos. The galaxies, initially classified as regularly rotating discs based on ALMA observations alone, appear in JWST as extended and symmetric stellar discs with spiral arms. Our dynamical models reproduce the rotation of the discs in the outer parts well, but they systematically underpredict the inner rotation velocities, revealing a deficit of central mass relative to the data. This discrepancy indicates either an underestimation of the bulge masses due to variations in the stellar mass-to-light ratio or dust attenuation or the presence of overmassive black holes. Alternatively, it may suggest departures from standard dark-matter halo profiles, including enhanced central concentrations.

AI.tldr: 该研究结合ALMA和JWST观测数据，分析三个高红移盘状星系的旋转曲线，发现动力学模型在星系中心区域低估了旋转速度，表明存在中心质量缺失或暗物质分布异常。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系（z>0.5）的旋转曲线分析一直面临挑战，缺乏高分辨率运动学数据、准确追踪恒星表面密度的测光数据以及空间分辨的亚毫米观测来追踪冷气体分布。本研究旨在利用ALMA和JWST的先进观测能力，研究高红移盘状星系的动力学特性并约束其暗物质晕。
AI.method: 从ALPAKA样本中选取三个星系，结合ALMA的高分辨率冷气体观测和JWST的静止近红外成像数据。这些星系最初仅基于ALMA观测被分类为规则旋转盘。通过构建动力学模型来模拟星系的旋转曲线，并与观测数据进行比较。
AI.result: JWST观测显示这些星系是延伸的对称恒星盘，带有旋臂结构。动力学模型能够很好地再现星系外围区域的旋转，但系统性地低估了中心区域的旋转速度，揭示了相对于观测数据的中心质量缺失。
AI.conclusion: 观测与模型之间的差异表明：1）由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估；2）存在超大质量黑洞；3）偏离标准暗物质晕分布，包括增强的中心浓度。这些发现对高红移星系的暗物质分布和中心质量构成提出了重要问题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 规则旋转盘星系的旋转曲线是研究引力势和暗物质分布的独特探针。直到最近，对红移$z>0.5$的星系进行物质分解仍然具有挑战性，这不仅是因为缺乏高分辨率的运动学数据，还因为缺乏能够精确追踪恒星面密度的合适测光数据以及能够追踪冷气体分布的空间分辨亚毫米观测数据。本文分析了来自档案大型运动学分析计划（ALPAKA）样本的三个星系，结合ALMA的高分辨率冷气体观测数据和JWST的静止系近红外成像数据，研究它们的动力学性质并约束其暗物质晕。这些星系最初仅基于ALMA观测被分类为规则旋转盘，在JWST图像中表现为具有旋臂的延展且对称的恒星盘。我们的动力学模型很好地再现了星系外部的旋转，但系统性地低估了内部旋转速度，揭示了相对于数据而言中心质量的不足。这种差异表明，要么是由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估，要么是存在超大质量黑洞。或者，它可能暗示偏离了标准暗物质晕轮廓，包括增强的中心浓度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测与模型之间的差异表明：1）由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估；2）存在超大质量黑洞；3）偏离标准暗物质晕分布，包括增强的中心浓度。这些发现对高红移星系的暗物质分布和中心质量构成提出了重要问题。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Main properties and data of the three ALPAKA discs studied in this paper. The galaxies were selected based on their kinematic properties, spatial resolution and availability of ancillary JWST data, as explained in the main text. Columns: (i) ALPAKA ID number. (ii) Redshift of the galaxy. (iii) Emission line used for the kinematics. (iv) Corresponding emission-line luminosity. (v) Number of independent resolution elements over the major axis of the ALMA data, defined as the diameter of the gas disc divided by the circularised ALMA beam. (vi) and (vii) JWST imaging filter used for tracing the distribution of the stellar continuum and the corresponding rest-frame pivot wavelength. (viii) and (ix) Stellar mass and star formation rate, respectively (see Rizzo et al. , 2023 , for details) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文研究的三个ALPAKA盘的主要性质和数据。这些星系是根据其运动学性质、空间分辨率以及辅助JWST数据的可用性选择的，详见正文。列：(i) ALPAKA编号。(ii) 星系红移。(iii) 用于运动学的发射线。(iv) 相应的发射线光度。(v) ALMA数据长轴上的独立分辨率元数量，定义为气体盘直径除以圆化后的ALMA波束。(vi) 和 (vii) 用于追踪恒星连续谱分布的JWST成像滤光片及其相应的静止系中心波长。(viii) 和 (ix) 恒星质量和恒星形成率（详见Rizzo等人，2023）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top row: ALPAKA subsample of galaxies analysed in this work. The galaxies are organised in ascending order of redshift, from left to right. The gas data (see Table 1 ) are shown as blue contours with levels following \(3\sigma\) , \(6\sigma\) and \(12\sigma\) , where \(\sigma\) is the root-mean-square (RMS) noise of the ALMA moment 0th map of the gas emission. We also show negative emission with dashed contours at the \(-3\sigma\) level and the corresponding ALMA beam on the bottom left of each panel. In the background, we display the JWST filter used for deriving the stellar surface brightness, same as the one reported in Table 1 . The ALMA contours shown here are simply the emission levels on the unmasked 0th-moment maps, therefore they differ from the pseudo-X \(\sigma\) contours shown in Rizzo et al. ( 2023 ) . Bottom row: RGB composite JWST images. We note that the scales in the top and bottom rows are different with a larger FOV on the bottom panels that allow us to see the foreground and background galaxies surrounding ID3 and ID13.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上行：本文分析的ALPAKA子样本星系。星系按红移升序从左到右排列。气体数据（见表1）以蓝色等高线显示，水平为\(3\sigma\)、\(6\sigma\)和\(12\sigma\)，其中\(\sigma\)是ALMA气体发射0阶矩图的均方根（RMS）噪声。我们还用虚线等高线显示负发射，水平为\(-3\sigma\)，并在每个面板的左下方显示相应的ALMA波束。背景中显示用于导出恒星面亮度的JWST滤光片，与表1中报告的相同。此处显示的ALMA等高线仅是未掩膜0阶矩图上的发射水平，因此它们不同于Rizzo等人（2023）中显示的伪X \(\sigma\)等高线。下行：RGB合成JWST图像。我们注意到上行和下行的尺度不同，下面板具有更大的视场，使我们能够看到ID3和ID13周围的前景和背景星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Priors for the parameters defining the 2D gas surface brightness models: intensity at the effective radius ( \(I_{{eff}}\) ), effective radius ( \(R_{{eff}}\) ), geometric centre ( \(x_{0}\) , \(y_{0}\) ), ellipticity ( \(\epsilon\) ) and position angle ( \(PA\) ). For the intensity, we arbitrarily chose 1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) as the lower bound of the prior. \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) is the RMS noise in the map.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：定义二维气体面亮度模型参数的先验：有效半径处的强度（\(I_{{eff}}\)）、有效半径（\(R_{{eff}}\)）、几何中心（\(x_{0}\)、\(y_{0}\)）、椭圆率（\(\epsilon\)）和位置角（\(PA\)）。对于强度，我们任意选择1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)作为先验的下界。\(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)是图中的RMS噪声。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Rotation curve decomposition priors: fiducial model. The main three parameters we fit are the total gas mass, the total stellar mass and the dark matter mass. The total gas mass is computed by the product of the CO/[CI] luminosity (see Table 1 ) and the gas normalisation, i.e. the CO/[CI] line ratio ( \(r_{l}\) ) times the \(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\) conversion. The truncation radius is assumed to be the extent of the gas data, that is the last radius in the CO/[CI] rotation curve. The total stellar mass is let free to vary and it is computed by the sum of the contribution of the disc and bulge masses assuming that the mass-to-light ratio of the bulge is 1.4 times that of the disc. The dark matter mass is computed from the baryonic fraction parameter that is let free to vary uniformly in log space.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：旋转曲线分解先验：基准模型。我们拟合的三个主要参数是总气体质量、总恒星质量和暗物质质量。总气体质量由CO/[CI]光度（见表1）与气体归一化因子（即CO/[CI]线比率\(r_{l}\)乘以\(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\)转换因子）的乘积计算得出。截断半径假定为气体数据的范围，即CO/[CI]旋转曲线中的最后一个半径。总恒星质量自由变化，由盘和核球质量的贡献之和计算得出，假设核球的质量-光比是盘的1.4倍。暗物质质量由重子分数参数计算得出，该参数在对数空间中均匀自由变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID1. Top left panel: the ALMA moment 0 map is overlayed with yellow contours for the data and orange for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 6 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , etc., where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. We also show negative contours with dashed gray lines at levels \(-3\sigma\) and \(-6\sigma\) . Top middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Top right panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The yellow band represents the data and its uncertainties while the orange solid line represents the best-fit model. Bottom left panel: JWST image in grayscale is overlayed with teal contours for the data and blue for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , 27 \(\sigma\) , etc. above the background, where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. Bottom middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Bottom left panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The teal band represents the data and the blue solid line represents the total best-fit model which is composed by a stellar disc (dotted dark blue line) and stellar bulge (dashed red line). In both top and bottom right panels we show the circularised ALMA beam/ JWST PSF and the data RMS as vertical dotted and horizontal dashed lines, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ID1的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。左上方面板：ALMA 0阶矩图叠加了数据的黄色等高线和最佳拟合模型的橙色等高线，水平为3 \(\sigma\)、6 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。我们还用灰色虚线显示负等高线，水平为\(-3\sigma\)和\(-6\sigma\)。上中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。右上方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。黄色带表示数据及其不确定性，橙色实线表示最佳拟合模型。左下方面板：灰度JWST图像叠加了数据的青色等高线和最佳拟合模型的蓝色等高线，水平为背景以上3 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)、27 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。下中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。左下方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。青色带表示数据，蓝色实线表示总最佳拟合模型，该模型由恒星盘（深蓝色虚线）和恒星核球（红色虚线）组成。在右上和右下方面板中，我们分别用垂直虚线和水平虚线显示圆化后的ALMA波束/JWST PSF和数据RMS。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Best-fit parameters of the 2D surface brightness fits to the gas and stars. The gas discs were modelled using our DYNESTY based script and the stellar discs and bulges were modelled using GALFIT . For the latter, we employed a two-iteration fitting process in which the geometric parameters (indicated with an asterisk) were fixed in the second iteration to reduce the number of free parameters. Both the gas and stellar disc are exponential discs and the bulge is a de Vaucouleurs profile. \(R_{eff}\) for the exponential disc is calculated as \(1.678\times R_{d}\)
figures.caption_zh: 表4：气体和恒星二维面亮度拟合的最佳拟合参数。气体盘使用我们基于DYNESTY的脚本建模，恒星盘和核球使用GALFIT建模。对于后者，我们采用了两轮迭代拟合过程，其中几何参数（用星号表示）在第二轮迭代中被固定以减少自由参数的数量。气体盘和恒星盘都是指数盘，核球是德沃库勒轮廓。指数盘的\(R_{eff}\)计算为\(1.678\times R_{d}\)

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID3. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 . We note that there are foreground/background galaxies seen visible in the near-infrared (bottom left panel) that are fitted simultaneously to the target galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ID3的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同。我们注意到，在近红外（左下方面板）中可见的前景/背景星系与目标星系同时被拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID13. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 and, similar to ID3, this galaxy is also surrounded by foreground/background galaxies that are fitted simultaneously.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ID13的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同，与ID3类似，该星系也被同时拟合的前景/背景星系所包围。

title: A first systematic study of [OIII] 88$μ$m at $z>8$: two luminous oxygen lines and a powerful ionized outflow in the first 600 million years
comment: 18 pages + appendices; 7 figures in main text; to be submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: We present deep ALMA Band 7 observations of the [OIII] $88μ$m line and underlying dust continuum emission in four UV-bright, gravitationally lensed (magnification $μ= 1.4-3.8$), JWST-selected galaxies at $z = 8.5 - 10.3$, with observed magnitudes $-22.5 \lesssim M_\mathrm{UV} \lesssim -20.5$. [OIII] $88μ$m is confidently detected in UNCOVER-10646 at $z=8.5080 \pm 0.0011$ ($15σ$) and DHZ1 at $z=9.3113 \pm 0.0005$ ($6σ$), with both being intrinsically luminous systems [$L_\mathrm{[OIII]} = (1.1 - 1.6) \times 10^9$ $L_\odot$] that follow the local [OIII]-SFR relation. [OIII] $88μ$m remains undetected in the two $z>10$ targets, including in the $z=10.07$ X-ray AGN UHZ1, where we obtain a deep limit of $L_\mathrm{[OIII]} < 6 \times 10^7$ $L_\odot$. Dust emission is not detected in any individual source nor in a stack ($<3σ$). The high S/N [OIII] $88μ$m detection in UNCOVER-10646 uniquely reveals an additional broad component ($\mathrm{FWHM} = 1366_{-329}^{+473}$ $\mathrm{km/s}$; $Δ\mathrm{BIC}\approx20$) indicative of an ionized outflow. We infer a high outflow rate of $\dot{M}_\mathrm{out} = 128_{-46}^{+80}$ $M_\odot\mathrm{yr}^{-1}$, corresponding to a mass loading factor $η= \dot{M}_\mathrm{out}/\mathrm{SFR} = 2.9_{-1.0}^{+1.8}$ that is broadly consistent with theoretical predictions and JWST-based studies of ionized outflows at high redshift. While high-resolution ALMA follow-up is required to confirm the outflow, this first systematic study at $z>8$ highlights the unique diagnostic power of [OIII] $88μ$m in characterizing galaxies in the early Universe.

AI.tldr: ALMA Band 7观测在4个z=8.5-10.3的JWST选源中探测到[OIII] 88μm发射线，其中两个源有高置信度探测，揭示了早期宇宙星系的性质和可能的电离外流。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙（z>8）星系的性质，特别是通过[OIII] 88μm线探测来表征星系特性，包括恒星形成活动、尘埃含量以及可能的星系外流现象。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 7对4个引力透镜放大（μ=1.4-3.8）的JWST选源进行深度观测，探测[OIII] 88μm线和尘埃连续谱发射，并进行光谱分析和外流特征识别。
AI.result: 在UNCOVER-10646（z=8.5080，15σ）和DHZ1（z=9.3113，6σ）中探测到[OIII] 88μm线，两者都遵循本地[OIII]-SFR关系；在z>10的目标中未探测到[OIII]；尘埃发射在所有源中均未探测到；UNCOVER-10646中发现了宽成分（FWHM=1366 km/s），表明存在电离外流。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次在z>8的系统性研究，展示了[OIII] 88μm线在表征早期宇宙星系中的独特诊断能力，为理解高红移星系的外流和反馈机制提供了重要线索。

recommendation.reason: 该论文与用户兴趣高度吻合：核心主题为强引力透镜（gravitationally lensed）和JWST选源的高红移星系，使用ALMA观测[OIII] 88μm线，研究电离外流、尘埃和恒星形成，直接对应Zotero画像中的高权重关键词（lens, lensing, jwst, alma, dust, star-forming galaxies, outflow）。多位核心作者（Seiji Fujimoto, Manuel Aravena, Andrea Pallottini, Laura Sommovigo, Andrea Ferrara）在列，且论文聚焦于z>8早期宇宙星系性质，完全符合用户优先领域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了四个UV明亮、受引力透镜效应（放大倍数μ=1.4-3.8）、由JWST选出的红移z=8.5-10.3星系的深度ALMA Band 7观测结果，涉及[OIII] 88μm谱线及其下方的尘埃连续谱发射，观测星等范围为-22.5 ≲ M_UV ≲ -20.5。在红移z=8.5080 ± 0.0011的UNCOVER-10646（15σ）和红移z=9.3113 ± 0.0005的DHZ1（6σ）中，[OIII] 88μm被可靠探测到，两者均为内在明亮的系统[L_[OIII] = (1.1 - 1.6) × 10^9 L_⊙]，遵循局域[OIII]-恒星形成率关系。在两个z>10的目标中，包括红移z=10.07的X射线活动星系核UHZ1，[OIII] 88μm未被探测到，我们获得了L_[OIII] < 6 × 10^7 L_⊙的深度上限。在任何单个源或叠加图像中均未探测到尘埃发射（<3σ）。UNCOVER-10646中高信噪比的[OIII] 88μm探测独特地揭示了一个额外的宽成分（FWHM = 1366_{-329}^{+473} km/s；ΔBIC≈20），表明存在电离外流。我们推断出高速外流率Ṁ_out = 128_{-46}^{+80} M_⊙ yr^{-1}，对应的质量负载因子η= Ṁ_out/SFR = 2.9_{-1.0}^{+1.8}，与理论预测及基于JWST的高红移电离外流研究大致一致。虽然需要高分辨率ALMA后续观测来确认该外流，但这项z>8的首次系统性研究突显了[OIII] 88μm在表征早期宇宙星系方面的独特诊断能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这是首次在z>8的系统性研究，展示了[OIII] 88μm线在表征早期宇宙星系中的独特诊断能力，为理解高红移星系的外流和反馈机制提供了重要线索。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Absolute UV magnitude versus redshift (bottom \(x\) -axis) and Cosmic time (top axis) for our targets (large, colored markers) and other \(z>8\) galaxies targeted in [O iii ] 88 in the literature (white squares; hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025 ) . The larger, opaque markers show the apparent brightness, including the effects of gravitational lensing, while the smaller symbols – connected via the dashed lines – correspond to de-lensed values. We moreover show the compilation of \(z>6.5\) galaxies spectroscopically confirmed with the JWST from tang2024 ; tang2025 as well as the \(z>8\) photometric candidates from hainline2024 . Our targets are particularly UV-luminous galaxies at \(z>8\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们目标源（大彩色标记）及其他文献中在[O iii] 88处观测的z>8星系（白色方块；hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025）的绝对UV星等与红移（底部x轴）和宇宙时间（顶部轴）的关系。较大的不透明标记显示表观亮度（包括引力透镜效应），而较小的符号（通过虚线连接）对应去透镜后的值。此外，我们展示了来自tang2024 ; tang2025的JWST光谱证认的z>6.5星系汇编，以及来自hainline2024的z>8测光候选体。我们的目标源是z>8处特别UV明亮的星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of our four targets
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们四个目标源的物理性质

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Properties of the naturally-weighted ALMA Band 7 data presented in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本文呈现的自然权重ALMA Band 7数据的性质

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Naturally-weighted ALMA Band 7 dust continuum cutouts ( \(3^{\prime\prime}\times 3^{\prime\prime}\) ) of our four targets, overplotted on JWST /NIRCam F150W imaging. Contours are drawn at \(\pm 2,3,4,\ldots\times\sigma\) intervals, where \(\sigma\) is the continuum RMS. Negative contours are dashed. None of the sources are convincingly dust-detected, although UNCOVER-10646 shows a \(\sim 2\sigma\) continuum signal in tapered imaging (Figure 9 in Appendix B ), tentatively suggesting the presence of an extended dust reservoir.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们四个目标源的自然权重ALMA Band 7尘埃连续谱剪裁图（3″×3″），叠加在JWST/NIRCam F150W成像上。等高线以±2,3,4,…×σ间隔绘制，其中σ为连续谱均方根。负等高线用虚线表示。没有源被令人信服地探测到尘埃，尽管UNCOVER-10646在锥形成像中显示出约2σ的连续谱信号（附录B中的图9），初步表明存在一个延展的尘埃储库。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: ALMA [O iii ] 88 cutouts ( \(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) ) of our four targets, overplotted on JWST /NIRCam F444W imaging. For UNCOVER-10646 and DHZ1, where [O iii ] 88 emission is robustly detected, the moment-0 map spans all channels within \(1.2\times\) the line FWHM. No line emission is detected in UHZ1 and UNCOVER-37126, and the moment-0 map is collapsed across \(200\,{km/s}\) centered on the fiducial redshifts of \(z=10.073\) and \(z=10.255\) , respectively. Contours are drawn at \(\pm 2,3,4,\ldots,10\sigma\) intervals, with negative contours being dashed and \(\sigma\) being the RMS in the moment-0 map.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们四个目标源的ALMA [O iii] 88剪裁图（4″×4″），叠加在JWST/NIRCam F444W成像上。对于UNCOVER-10646和DHZ1，其中[O iii] 88发射被可靠探测，零阶矩图覆盖了线FWHM的1.2倍内的所有通道。在UHZ1和UNCOVER-37126中未探测到线发射，零阶矩图分别以z=10.073和z=10.255的基准红移为中心，在200 km/s范围内坍缩。等高线以±2,3,4,…,10σ间隔绘制，负等高线用虚线表示，σ为零阶矩图中的均方根。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Extracted 1D spectra showing the [O iii ] 88 detections for UNCOVER-10646 at \(z=8.51\) ( left ) and DHZ1 at \(z=9.31\) ( right ). A Gaussian fit to the spectra is shown through the red lines. The vertical shading shows the channels across which the moment-0 maps in Figure 3 are collapsed, while the gray shading represents the noise per channel. The best-fit parameters are presented in Table 3 . Note that the spectrum of UNCOVER-10646 is better fit by a double-Gaussian, as detailed in Section 4.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：提取的一维光谱，显示UNCOVER-10646在z=8.51（左）和DHZ1在z=9.31（右）处的[O iii] 88探测。红色线条显示对光谱的高斯拟合。垂直阴影显示图3中零阶矩图坍缩所跨越的通道，灰色阴影表示每通道的噪声。最佳拟合参数见表3。注意，UNCOVER-10646的光谱更适合用双高斯拟合，详见第4.3节。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Dust continuum, [O iii ] 88 \(\mu{m}\) , and related properties of our targets
figures.caption_zh: 表3：我们目标源的尘埃连续谱、[O iii] 88 μm及相关性质

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: The [O iii ] 88 -SFR relation of \(z>6\) galaxies. Our four \(z>8.5\) targets are overplotted as the colored symbols, while \(z>8\) ( \(6\lesssim z algera2025_oiii are shown as white (grey) squares. We show UNCOVER-37126 as a semi-transparent symbol, given that its [O iii ] 88 line is possibly missed by our ALMA observations as a result of its uncertain, Lyman-break-based redshift. The local relations for starbursts ( green ), dwarf galaxies ( blue ) and AGN ( purple ) from delooze2014 are indicated through the shaded bands. All values are corrected for lensing, where necessary. Our sample shows [O iii ] 88 luminosities consistent with the local dwarf galaxy relation, in agreement with previous studies of \(z\gtrsim 6\) galaxies with \({SFR}\lesssim 100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\) . Right: the [O iii ] 88 luminosity of \(z>6\) galaxies plotted against redshift. We highlight the individually [O iii ] 88 -detected galaxies at \(z>8\) (c.f., hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025 ) . Our line-detected galaxies, UNCOVER-10646 and DHZ1, are the two most [O iii ] 88 -luminous sources known at \(z>8\) and \(z>9\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左图：z>6星系的[O iii] 88 -恒星形成率关系。我们四个z>8.5的目标源用彩色符号叠加，而z>8（6≲z<8）的文献源（白色方块）和z>8的文献源（灰色方块）来自algera2025_oiii。我们将UNCOVER-37126显示为半透明符号，因为其[O iii] 88线可能因不确定的莱曼断裂基准红移而被我们的ALMA观测遗漏。来自delooze2014的星暴星系（绿色）、矮星系（蓝色）和活动星系核（紫色）的局域关系通过阴影带表示。所有值均已根据需要进行透镜校正。我们的样本显示出与局域矮星系关系一致的[O iii] 88光度，与先前对SFR≲100 M_⊙ yr^{-1}的z≳6星系的研究一致。右图：z>6星系的[O iii] 88光度与红移的关系。我们突出显示了在z>8处单独探测到[O iii] 88的星系（参见hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025）。我们的线探测星系UNCOVER-10646和DHZ1分别是已知在z>8和z>9处[O iii] 88最明亮的源。

title: AtLAST -- A five fold increase in the number of identified Strongly Lensed Galaxies in the sub-millimetre and its consequences
comment: This white paper was submitted to ESO Expanding Horizons in support of AtLAST
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful probe of cosmology, dark matter (DM), and high-redshift galaxy evolution, but current samples of strongly lensed galaxies (SLGs) remain far too small to exploit its full potential. $\textit{Herschel}$'s submillimeter (submm) surveys demonstrated that submm selection provides the most efficient and least biased route to identifying high-redshift SLGs, yet produced only a few hundred systems over limited, heterogeneous fields. Achieving the thousands of SLGs required for precision cosmology and detailed studies of distant dusty star-forming galaxies demands a new, wide-area, homogeneous sub-mm survey. A facility like AtLAST, capable of extending $\textit{Herschel}$-like methodologies to much larger areas, is uniquely positioned to deliver the order-of-magnitude increase in SLG numbers needed for transformative progress.

AI.tldr: AtLAST天文台通过大面积均匀亚毫米波巡天，可将强引力透镜星系样本数量提升一个数量级，从而推动宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究
AI.motivation: 当前强引力透镜星系样本数量太少，限制了其在宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究中的潜力。虽然赫歇尔望远镜的亚毫米波巡天证明这是最有效且偏差最小的识别高红移强引力透镜星系的方法，但仅发现了数百个系统，且覆盖区域有限且不均匀。
AI.method: 提出利用AtLAST天文台进行大面积、均匀的亚毫米波巡天，扩展赫歇尔望远镜的方法论，覆盖更广阔的天区，从而系统性地发现更多强引力透镜星系。
AI.result: AtLAST天文台能够将强引力透镜星系的数量提升一个数量级，达到数千个系统，满足精确宇宙学和遥远尘埃恒星形成星系详细研究的需求。
AI.conclusion: AtLAST天文台通过实施大面积均匀亚毫米波巡天，能够实现强引力透镜星系样本的数量级增长，为宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究带来变革性进展。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是宇宙学、暗物质（DM）和高红移星系演化的有力探针，但目前已知的强透镜星系（SLG）样本仍然太小，无法充分发挥其全部潜力。赫歇尔（$\textit{Herschel}$）的亚毫米（submm）巡天表明，亚毫米选择是识别高红移SLG最有效且偏差最小的途径，但仅在有限的、不均匀的场中产生了数百个系统。要实现精密宇宙学以及对遥远尘埃恒星形成星系进行详细研究所需的数千个SLG，需要一项新的、大面积的、均匀的亚毫米巡天。像AtLAST这样的设施，能够将类似赫歇尔的方法扩展到更大的区域，具有独特的优势，可以提供SLG数量数量级的增长，从而实现变革性的进展。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AtLAST天文台通过实施大面积均匀亚毫米波巡天，能够实现强引力透镜星系样本的数量级增长，为宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究带来变革性进展。

title: Origins of the UV continuum and Balmer emission lines in Little Red Dots: observational validation of dense gas envelope models enshrouding the AGN
comment: Submitted to ApJL. Comments are welcome
summary: We present a statistical study on the origins of the UV continuum and narrow/broad emission lines in little red dots (LRDs), a newly discovered class of active galactic nuclei (AGNs). Leveraging all archived JWST/NIRSpec data, we build a sample of 28 spectroscopically-confirmed LRDs at $5<z_{\rm spec}<7.2$, by requiring broad H$α$ emission, blue UV colors, V-shaped continua, and compact morphologies. We define a control sample of 9 blue, compact, broad-line AGNs without red optical continua (hereafter little blue dots; LBDs), and examine correlations between rest UV and the narrow/broad H$α$ luminosities in these populations. In LRDs, both narrow and broad H$α$ components are tightly correlated with the UV continuum, and the luminosity ratios are consistent with those in young starburst galaxies. In contrast, the UV to broad H$α$ ratios in LBDs closely match local unobscured AGNs and are statistically different from LRDs. The Ly$α$ occurrence rates and strengths do not differ between LRDs and LBDs and are comparable to normal star-forming galaxies. These results are consistent with a scenario where the central BH in LRDs is enshrouded by a dense opaque gas envelope -- in this model, the UV continuum as well as narrow and even broad H$α$ emissions are not powered by AGNs but predominantly by young massive stars surrounding the envelope, while the envelope radiates as a $\sim 5000$ K blackbody. As the envelope dissipates, direct AGN emission can emerge, potentially transforming LRDs into LBDs and marking the end of a short-lived phase of rapid black hole growth.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过JWST/NIRSpec数据分析了"小红点"（LRDs）的UV连续谱和窄/宽发射线起源，发现LRDs中的UV和Hα发射主要来自年轻大质量恒星而非活动星系核，支持LRDs是中心黑洞被稠密气体包层包裹的短寿命快速生长阶段。
AI.motivation: 研究新发现的"小红点"（LRDs）类活动星系核中UV连续谱和窄/宽发射线的起源，理解这些天体与普通AGN的差异及其在黑洞早期演化中的作用。
AI.method: 利用所有存档的JWST/NIRSpec数据，构建了28个红移5-7.2的光谱确认LRDs样本，要求具有宽Hα发射、蓝色UV颜色、V形连续谱和致密形态。同时定义了9个没有红色光学连续谱的蓝色致密宽线AGN作为对照样本（LBDs），分析UV与窄/宽Hα光度之间的相关性。
AI.result: 在LRDs中，窄和宽Hα分量都与UV连续谱紧密相关，光度比与年轻星暴星系一致；而LBDs中的UV到宽Hα比与本地未遮蔽AGN匹配，且与LRDs有统计差异。Lyα出现率和强度在两类天体中没有差异，与正常恒星形成星系相当。
AI.conclusion: 结果支持LRDs中心黑洞被稠密不透明气体包层包裹的模型：UV连续谱以及窄甚至宽Hα发射主要由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星提供，而非AGN本身。随着包层消散，直接AGN辐射可能显现，LRDs可能转变为LBDs，标志着黑洞快速生长的短寿命阶段结束。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于JWST观测的‘小红点’（LRDs）高红移活动星系核，核心研究UV连续谱与Hα发射线的起源，涉及稠密气体包层、星暴星系等主题，与用户兴趣画像中的JWST、稠密气体、恒星形成星系、星暴星系高度匹配。作者中包含用户核心作者seiji fujimoto和kohei inayoshi，且论文方法（JWST/NIRSpec光谱分析）与用户常用手段一致。论文主题与用户强引力透镜领域虽无直接重叠，但高红移星系物理、稠密气体、AGN演化等方向与用户兴趣高度相关，且用户明确要求优先考虑高红移星系动力学、多相气体等方向，因此给予高分。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们对小红点（LRDs）中紫外连续谱和窄/宽发射线的起源进行了统计研究，LRDs是一类新发现的活跃星系核（AGNs）。利用所有存档的JWST/NIRSpec数据，我们构建了一个包含28个光谱证认的LRDs样本，红移范围为$5<z_{\rm spec}<7.2$，要求具有宽Hα发射、蓝色紫外颜色、V形连续谱和致密形态。我们定义了一个由9个蓝色、致密、宽发射线AGN组成的对照样本，这些AGN没有红色光学连续谱（以下简称小蓝点；LBDs），并研究了这些天体静止系紫外光度与窄/宽Hα光度之间的相关性。在LRDs中，窄和宽Hα分量均与紫外连续谱紧密相关，其光度比与年轻星暴星系中的一致。相比之下，LBDs中紫外与宽Hα的光度比与本地未遮蔽AGN的比值非常接近，并且在统计上与LRDs不同。Lyα出现率和强度在LRDs和LBDs之间没有差异，且与正常恒星形成星系相当。这些结果与中心黑洞被稠密不透明气体包层包裹的情景一致——在该模型中，紫外连续谱以及窄甚至宽Hα发射并非由AGN提供能量，而是主要由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星主导，而包层则表现为一个约5000 K的黑体辐射。随着包层消散，直接的AGN辐射可能显现，从而可能将LRDs转变为LBDs，标志着黑洞快速生长的短寿命阶段结束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 结果支持LRDs中心黑洞被稠密不透明气体包层包裹的模型：UV连续谱以及窄甚至宽Hα发射主要由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星提供，而非AGN本身。随着包层消散，直接AGN辐射可能显现，LRDs可能转变为LBDs，标志着黑洞快速生长的短寿命阶段结束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic pictures of AGN+dense gas envelope models (also known as BH* models) for LRDs proposed in literature. (a) K. Inayoshi et al. ( 2025a ) proposed a model where the central BH is enshrouded by thick gas envelope. Since its optically thickness, no radiation from the AGN accretion can be escaped, and the envelope is thermalized and observed as a blackbody. In this model, all UV light, narrow lines, and broad lines are powered by young massive stars surrounding the envelope, and the rest optical continuum is explained by the thermal emission. (b) the cocoon envelope model originally proposed by R. P. Naidu et al. ( 2025 ) has a layered cocoon around the central BH. The broad lines are originated from the inner layer, which is illuminated by the accretion disk, and leak out after multiple scatterings through the outer layer. The cocoon is optically thick for UV continuum, and the UV light and narrow line in LRDs needs to be emitted from host galaxies. The rest optical continuum in this model originated either from the Balmer limit photon absorption by the cocoon or from the thermal emission of the cocoon heated by the AGN accretion. (c) when the dense envelope around the central BH is not spherical and is not optically thick towards the polar axis (e.g., X. Lin et al., 2025 ) , all UV light, narrow, and broad lines can be from the AGN accretion. This is similar to the standard AGN picture, but it lacks the dust torus and instead has a non-spherical envelope which emits blackbody thermal emission in the rest optical.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：文献中提出的LRDs的AGN+稠密气体包层模型（也称为BH*模型）示意图。(a) K. Inayoshi et al. ( 2025a ) 提出了一个模型，其中中心BH被厚气体包层包裹。由于其光学厚度，来自AGN吸积的辐射无法逃逸，包层被热化并作为黑体被观测到。在该模型中，所有紫外光、窄线和宽线均由包层周围的年轻大质量恒星提供能量，而静止光学连续谱则由热辐射解释。(b) 最初由R. P. Naidu et al. ( 2025 ) 提出的茧状包层模型在中心BH周围有一个分层茧。宽线起源于内层，由吸积盘照亮，并经过外层多次散射后泄漏出来。茧对紫外连续谱是光学厚的，LRDs中的紫外光和窄线需要由宿主星系发射。该模型中的静止光学连续谱要么源于茧对Balmer极限光子的吸收，要么源于被AGN吸积加热的茧的热辐射。(c) 当中心BH周围的稠密包层不是球对称且对极轴方向不是光学厚时（例如，X. Lin et al., 2025 ），所有紫外光、窄线和宽线都可以来自AGN吸积。这与标准AGN图像类似，但缺少尘埃环，取而代之的是一个非球对称包层，该包层在静止光学波段发射黑体热辐射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Sample selection in this work. (a) we select LRDs with V-shaped continua from spectroscopically-confirmed broad H \(\alpha\) line emitters at \(5 (M. V. Maseda et al., 2024 ) . The top panel presents the NIRSpec/Prism spectrum, and the bottom panel shows the Ly \(\alpha\) (left) and H \(\alpha\) (right) line profile. For the Ly \(\alpha\) line, the best-fit line profile is shown with the blue solid curve, while the continuum-only fit model is with the dashed curve. For the H \(\alpha\) line, the best-fit line profiles with narrow, unresolved component fit (orange) and broad+narrow components fit (blue) are shown, and the noise-normalized residual for each case is presented in the lower sub-panel. (c) same as panel (b) but for an example of the LBDs, taken as part of the RUBIES program (A. de Graaff et al., 2025b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：本工作中的样本选择。(a) 我们从光谱证认的宽Hα发射体中选择具有V形连续谱的LRDs，红移范围为5 (M. V. Maseda et al., 2024 ) 。顶部面板展示了NIRSpec/棱镜光谱，底部面板显示了Lyα（左）和Hα（右）线轮廓。对于Lyα线，最佳拟合线轮廓以蓝色实线曲线显示，而仅连续谱拟合模型以虚线曲线显示。对于Hα线，显示了窄、未分辨分量拟合（橙色）和宽+窄分量拟合（蓝色）的最佳拟合线轮廓，并在下方子面板中给出了每种情况的噪声归一化残差。(c) 与面板(b)相同，但针对一个LBDs的示例，该示例取自RUBIES计划（A. de Graaff et al., 2025b ）的一部分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Rest UV versus H \(\alpha\) line luminosity in LRDs (top) and LBDs (bottom). Broad and narrow components are displayed on the left and right, respectively. Plots are color-coded by the Balmer break strength, defined as \(f_{\nu,4230}/f_{\nu,3560}\) . As a reference, the UV-to-H \(\alpha\) luminosity ratios for young starburst galaxies (black dotted line) and typical Type 1 AGNs (red solid line) are also shown. The gray shaded band shows the range of the luminosity ratio when the stellar age and gas density is varied for young star-forming galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：LRDs（顶部）和LBDs（底部）中静止系紫外光度与Hα线光度的关系。左侧和右侧分别显示宽分量和窄分量。绘图按Balmer跳变强度进行颜色编码，定义为\(f_{\nu,4230}/f_{\nu,3560}\)。作为参考，还显示了年轻星暴星系（黑色虚线）和典型1型AGN（红色实线）的紫外与Hα光度比。灰色阴影带显示了年轻恒星形成星系中恒星年龄和气体密度变化时光度比的范围。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: UV-to-H \(\alpha\) luminosity ratios † † footnotetext: \(\star\) Median values among the sample are quoted. The standard deviations are quoted as the uncertainty. † † footnotetext: \(\dagger\) Measured from the compiled spectrum of local Type 1 AGNs by D. E. Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) . † † footnotetext: \(\dagger\dagger\) Estimated from BPASS+Cloudy photoionization modeling. The possible range of this ratio under different assumptions on nebular/stellar conditions are quoted as the uncertainty.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：紫外与Hα光度比† † 脚注文本：\(\star\) 引用样本中的中位数值。标准差作为不确定性引用。† † 脚注文本：\(\dagger\) 根据D. E. Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) 的本地1型AGN汇编光谱测量。† † 脚注文本：\(\dagger\dagger\) 根据BPASS+Cloudy光电离建模估算。该比值在星云/恒星条件不同假设下的可能范围作为不确定性引用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Ly \(\alpha\) line equivalent widths of the sample broad H \(\alpha\) emitters at \(z=5-7.2\) , plotted against the rest UV absolute magnitude. They distribute at a very similar locus as normal SFGs at the same redshift range (J. Kerutt et al., 2022 ) , and there is no significant difference between LRDs and LBDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：样本宽Hα发射体在红移\(z=5-7.2\)处的Lyα线等值宽度，相对于静止系紫外绝对星等绘制。它们分布在与相同红移范围内正常SFGs（J. Kerutt et al., 2022 ）非常相似的位置，并且LRDs和LBDs之间没有显著差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Histograms of the UV-to-H \(\alpha\) luminosity ratios for the broad-line component in LRDs (red), LBDs (blue), and the intermediate-color population (green). The vertical dashed line denotes the median of each population.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRDs（红色）、LBDs（蓝色）和中间颜色群体（绿色）中宽线分量的紫外与Hα光度比直方图。垂直虚线表示每个群体的中位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The effect of different size-luminosity relation on the BH mass estimation. The figure compares the BH mass estimations of the sample LRDs, assuming the typical \(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\) relation calibrated for AGN accretion disk ( \(x\) -axis) and assuming that BLRs are just at the photospheric radius of the blackbody envelope ( \(y\) -axis). Plots are color-coded by the blackbody temperature ( \(T_{BB}\) ). It demonstrates that using the typical \(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\) relation can overestimate the BH mass by \(\sim 1\) dex due to the different \(R_{BLR}\) estimations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同大小-光度关系对BH质量估计的影响。该图比较了样本LRDs的BH质量估计，假设典型的\(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\)关系（针对AGN吸积盘校准，\(x\)轴）和假设BLR恰好位于黑体包层的光球半径处（\(y\)轴）。绘图按黑体温度（\(T_{BB}\)）进行颜色编码。这表明，由于\(R_{BLR}\)估计不同，使用典型的\(R_{BLR}\) - \(L\)关系可能会将BH质量高估约\(\sim 1\) dex。

(5) Declination in J2000. (6) Spectroscopic redshift. (7) Rest UV continuum luminosity. (8) Broad H \(\alpha\) line luminosity. (9) Narrow H \(\alpha\) line luminosity. † † footnotetext: \(\dagger\) Luminosities are corrected for the dust attenuation (see the text).
