title: Baryonic mass budgets in the central regions of the Bullet Cluster and their consistency with strong lensing in MOND
summary: Strong lensing observations of the Bullet Cluster have traditionally been regarded as strong evidence for dark matter and a major challenge to Milgromian dynamics (MOND). The offset between the lensing mass and the X-ray gas centroids implies a substantial amount of unseen mass near the brightest cluster galaxies (BCGs). However, the high metallicities observed in both the intracluster gas and the massive early-type member galaxies suggest a past stellar population dominated by massive stars, whose evolved remnants contribute additional baryonic mass. This effect is naturally incorporated in the integrated galaxy-wide initial mass function (IGIMF) theory, which predicts substantially larger baryonic masses than a canonical IMF. In this work, we re-estimate the baryonic masses of the three BCG-centred core regions of the Bullet Cluster and compare them with MOND strong-lensing masses. We derive IGIMF masses using stellar population synthesis models with constant and (self-) enriched metallicities, representing lower and upper mass limits, respectively. We find that the MOND strong-lensing masses of all three cores lie within the range predicted by the IGIMF models. These results suggest that the baryonic mass budget inferred under the IGIMF framework is consistent with MOND requirements in the core regions of the Bullet Cluster. However, the physical viability of this scenario also depends on the spatial distribution and dynamical behavior of the remnant population, which remain to be established. More generally, regardless of the validity of MOND, the results imply that less dark matter may be required than previously inferred.

AI.tldr: 子弹头星团的强引力透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质的强证据和对MOND理论的挑战。本文利用IGIMF理论重新估计了星团核心区的重子质量，发现MOND强透镜质量落在IGIMF模型预测范围内，表明在IGIMF框架下重子质量预算与MOND要求一致，但剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为仍需验证。
AI.motivation: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测一直被视为暗物质存在的关键证据，同时对MOND理论构成重大挑战。作者希望检验MOND是否能在修正的重子质量估计下解释观测结果。
AI.method: 利用IGIMF理论，通过恒星族合成模型分别采用恒定金属丰度和自增丰金属丰度，对子弹头星团三个最亮星系团星系（BCG）核心区域的重子质量进行重新估计，并与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。
AI.result: 三个核心区域的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的质量范围内，表明IGIMF框架下的重子质量预算与MOND要求一致。
AI.conclusion: IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质存在的有力证据，也是对米尔格罗姆动力学（MOND）的重大挑战。透镜质量与X射线气体质心之间的偏移表明，在 brightest 星团星系（BCGs）附近存在大量不可见质量。然而，在星团内气体和大型早型成员星系中观测到的高金属丰度表明，过去恒星群体以大质量恒星为主，其演化后的残骸贡献了额外的重子质量。这一效应自然地包含在集成星系初始质量函数（IGIMF）理论中，该理论预测的重子质量比标准IMF显著更大。在本工作中，我们重新估计了子弹头星团三个以BCG为中心的核心区域的重子质量，并将其与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。我们使用恒星种群合成模型推导IGIMF质量，分别采用恒定金属丰度和（自）富集金属丰度，代表质量下限和上限。我们发现，所有三个核心的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的范围内。这些结果表明，在IGIMF框架下推断的重子质量预算与子弹头星团核心区域的MOND要求一致。然而，这一情景的物理可行性还取决于残骸种群的空间分布和动力学行为，这仍有待确定。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，这些结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

title: Constraining Axion-like Particles through Multi-epoch Monitoring of Strong Gravitational Lenses
summary: We present new constraints on ultralight axion-like particles (ALPs) through multi-epoch measurements of differential birefringence induced due to a coupling ($g_{aγ}$) between the ALP and electromagnetic fields. Broadband polarimetric observations in the 2-8 GHz range of the gravitationally lensed system CLASS B1152+199 were carried out over five epochs spanning three months with a cadence of roughly 20 days, and the differential birefringence angle ($Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}$) between the lensed images were estimated. We also combined an archival observation that effectively increases the span to 9.5 yr to probe the effect of an oscillating ALP field imprinted as oscillating ${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$ over time. Here we present a new technique for combining multi-epoch measurements of ${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$ by considering the coherence of the ALP field, such that, ${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$ over these observations are related. The time scale of coherence depends on the mass of the ALP field ($m_a$). With these new observations, we constrain $g_{aγ} \leq 9.0\times 10^{-12} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$ to $\leq 3.5\times 10^{-8} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$ for $m_a$ between $1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$ and $3.8\times 10^{-18}\;\mathrm{eV}$, where $ρ_{a,{\rm em}}$ is the density of the ALP field at emission. This improves over the constraint provided by the CERN Axion Solar Telescope by up to an order of magnitude in the $m_a$ range $1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$ to $3\times 10^{-21}$ eV.

AI.tldr: 通过多时期测量引力透镜系统B1152+199的双折射角变化，对超轻轴子类粒子(ALP)与电磁场的耦合常数g_{aγ}设置了新的约束，改进了现有实验的灵敏度。
AI.motivation: 超轻轴子类粒子(ALP)是暗物质候选粒子之一，通过其与电磁场的耦合会产生双折射效应。利用引力透镜系统的多时期观测可以探测ALP场的振荡特征，从而约束其物理参数。
AI.method: 在2-8 GHz波段对引力透镜系统CLASS B1152+199进行了五期宽带偏振观测，时间跨度三个月，间隔约20天。结合档案观测数据，总时间跨度达9.5年。开发了新的多时期测量组合技术，考虑ALP场的相干性，将不同时期的双折射角测量联系起来。
AI.result: 对ALP质量m_a在1.6×10^{-22} eV到3.8×10^{-18} eV范围内，约束了耦合常数g_{aγ} ≤ 9.0×10^{-12}到≤ 3.5×10^{-8} GeV^{-1}（归一化到ρ_{a,em}=20 GeV cm^{-3}）。在m_a范围1.6×10^{-22} eV到3×10^{-21} eV内，比CERN轴子太阳望远镜的约束提高了一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 多时期引力透镜偏振观测为探测超轻ALP提供了有效方法，新开发的相干性分析技术显著提高了对ALP参数的约束能力，为暗物质探测开辟了新途径。

recommendation.reason: 论文核心是利用强引力透镜系统CLASS B1152+199的多时期偏振观测来约束轴子类粒子，主题与用户Zotero画像中的'strong gravitational lensing'、'lens'、'lensed'高度匹配，且属于用户明确要求优先的强引力透镜研究。虽然粒子物理（ALP）并非用户主要兴趣，但论文将强引力透镜作为核心工具，方法上涉及偏振观测，与用户对高红移偏振的兴趣有间接关联。作者中无核心作者，但整体主题契合度极高，因此给予高分。

recommendation.method_fit: 中。论文使用多时期偏振观测测量双折射角，方法涉及引力透镜成像和偏振测量。用户兴趣包括高红移偏振，但论文的偏振观测主要用于粒子物理约束，而非直接研究星系动力学或气体性质，因此方法契合度中等。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过多时期测量由轴子类似粒子（ALP）与电磁场之间的耦合（$g_{aγ}$）引起的微分双折射，提出了对超轻轴子类似粒子的新约束。在跨度三个月的五个时期（间隔约20天）内，对引力透镜系统CLASS B1152+199进行了2-8 GHz范围的宽带偏振观测，并估计了透镜图像之间的微分双折射角（$Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}$）。我们还结合了一次档案观测，有效将时间跨度延长至9.5年，以探测振荡ALP场随时间在${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$上留下的印记。这里我们提出了一种新技术，通过考虑ALP场的相干性来组合${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$的多时期测量值，使得这些观测中的${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$相互关联。相干时间尺度取决于ALP场的质量（$m_a$）。通过这些新观测，我们将$g_{aγ}$约束在$g_{aγ} \leq 9.0\times 10^{-12} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$到$\leq 3.5\times 10^{-8} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$之间，对应$m_a$范围为$1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$到$3.8\times 10^{-18}\;\mathrm{eV}$，其中$ρ_{a,{\rm em}}$是发射处ALP场的密度。这比CERN轴子太阳望远镜在$m_a$范围$1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$到$3\times 10^{-21}$ eV内提供的约束提高了最多一个数量级。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，多时期引力透镜偏振观测为探测超轻ALP提供了有效方法，新开发的相干性分析技术显著提高了对ALP参数的约束能力，为暗物质探测开辟了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Epoch of observations of B1152+199 taken with the VLA used for searching for ALPs in this work. The five epochs labelled 1–5 were analysed for this work, and their combined analyses are referred to as ‘5-Epochs’. The combined analyses performed by combining ‘5-Epochs’ along with the archival data at epoch 6 is referred to as ‘6-Epochs’. For the purpose of computing time intervals, we use modified Julian date (MJD).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于本工作中搜索ALP的VLA对B1152+199的观测时期。标记为1–5的五个时期为本工作分析所用，其组合分析称为“5时期”。将“5时期”与时期6的档案数据结合进行的组合分析称为“6时期”。为计算时间间隔，我们使用修正儒略日（MJD）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Summary of the observations taken with the VLA for the 5-Epochs listed in table 1 . The rows are listed in time-order from the start of observing session, and the bands in each row are also in time-order.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：表1所列5时期VLA观测的总结。各行按观测开始时间顺序列出，每行中的波段也按时间顺序排列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Hubble Space Telescope image of CLASS B1152+199 observed using the F814W filter is overlaid by the VLA total intensity radio contour at 4.5 GHz. The resolution of the radio image is 0.5 arcsec shown as the white circle, and the blue contours are at 2, 10, 18, 26 and 34 \(mJy\,beam^{-1}\) . The two lensed images A and B are observed in both radio and optical frequencies whereas the lensing galaxy is only visible in the optical observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用F814W滤镜观测的CLASS B1152+199的哈勃空间望远镜图像，叠加了4.5 GHz的VLA总强度射电等高线。射电图像分辨率为0.5角秒，以白色圆圈表示，蓝色等高线位于2、10、18、26和34 \(mJy\,beam^{-1}\)。两个透镜图像A和B在射电和光学频率下均被观测到，而透镜星系仅在光学观测中可见。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Left panel shows the Stokes \(I\) spectra averaged over 20 MHz for the lensed images A and B in B1152+199. At all the epochs, the Stokes \(I\) flux densities are within the 5% flux scale uncertainty of the VLA. Right panel shows the lens magnification factor, \(\mu=S_{A}(\nu)/S_{B}(\nu)\) , of the lensed images as a function of frequency for the five epochs. To avoid overlap, each epoch is plotted with an offset shown in the right-hand \(y\) -axis. The grey lines are the corresponding best-fit \(\mu\) , again plotted with an offset. The shaded region in both the panels covering 1–2 GHz shows significant fluctuations due to blending of image A and B and the data in that frequency range were not used in our analyses.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图显示B1152+199中透镜图像A和B在20 MHz上平均的斯托克斯\(I\)谱。在所有时期，斯托克斯\(I\)流量密度均在VLA的5%流量标度不确定度内。右图显示五个时期透镜图像的透镜放大因子\(\mu=S_{A}(\nu)/S_{B}(\nu)\)随频率的变化。为避免重叠，每个时期以右\(y\)轴所示的偏移量绘制。灰色线是对应的最佳拟合\(\mu\)，同样以偏移量绘制。两个面板中覆盖1–2 GHz的阴影区域显示由于图像A和B混合导致的显著波动，该频率范围内的数据未用于我们的分析。

figures.caption_zh: 图3：通过RM合成获得的B1152+199中两个透镜图像在5时期的法拉第深度谱。两个峰值对应图像A（虚线）和B（实线）。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Stokes \(Q\) and \(U\) parameters at \(\nu_{eff}\) for Image A and B in B1152+199 obtained from the technique of RM synthesis. The uncertainties correspond to \(1\sigma\) values.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：通过RM合成技术获得的B1152+199中图像A和B在\(\nu_{eff}\)处的斯托克斯\(Q\)和\(U\)参数。不确定度对应\(1\sigma\)值。

figures.caption_en: Table 5 : Rotation measure obtained from RM synthesis for lensed images A ( \(RM_{A}\) ) and B ( \(RM_{B}\) ), and the observed polarisation angles, \(\theta_{A}\) and \(\theta_{B}\) at \(\nu_{\text{eff}}\) in B1152+199. The last column is for the differential birefringence angle ( \({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\) ) where we quote the median value obtained from the distributions in figure 4 . The uncertainties correspond to \(1\sigma\) values and to the 68% confidence interval for \({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表5：通过RM合成获得的B1152+199中透镜图像A（\(RM_{A}\)）和B（\(RM_{B}\)）的旋转测量值，以及在\(\nu_{\text{eff}}\)处观测到的偏振角\(\theta_{A}\)和\(\theta_{B}\)。最后一列为微分双折射角（\({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\)），其中我们引用从图4分布中获得的中值。不确定度对应\(1\sigma\)值，对于\({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\)对应68%置信区间。

title: Searching for Galaxy Cluster-Scale Strong lenses from the DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys
summary: Galaxy cluster-scale strong gravitational lensing systems are rare yet valuable tools for investigating the properties of dark matter and dark energy, as well as providing the opportunity to study the distant universe at flux levels and spatial resolutions that would otherwise be unavailable. Large-scale imaging surveys present unprecedented opportunities to expand the sample of cluster lenses. In this study, we adopt a deep learning-based approach to identify cluster lenses from the DESI Legacy Imaging Surveys, utilizing the catalog of galaxy cluster candidates identified by Zou et al. (2021). Our lens-finder employs a ResNet-18 architecture, trained with mock images of cluster lenses as positives and observational images of cluster scale non-lenses as negatives. We do an iterative operation to increase the completeness of our work, namely adding the found true positive samples back to the training set and training again for several times. Human inspection is conducted to further refine the candidates, categorizing them into grades (A, B, C) according to the significance of the strongly lensed arcs. Reviewing all 540,432 objects in Zou's catalog, we discover 485 high-confidence cluster lens candidates with a cluster $M_{500}$ range of $10^{13.67\sim14.97}M_{\odot}$ and a Brightest Central Galaxy (BCG) redshift range of $0.04\sim0.89$. After excluding the lens candidates listed in previous studies, we identify 247 newly discovered cluster lens candidates, including 16 grade A, 90 grade B, and 141 grade C. This catalog of cluster lens candidates is publicly available online, and follow-up observations are encouraged to confirm and conduct thorough investigations of these systems.

AI.tldr: 使用深度学习从DESI巡天数据中识别星系团引力透镜，通过迭代训练和人工筛选发现了485个高置信度候选体，其中247个是新发现的

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团尺度的强引力透镜系统是稀有但宝贵的工具，可用于研究暗物质和暗能量的性质，并提供以其他方式无法获得的通量水平和空间分辨率来研究遥远宇宙的机会。大规模成像巡天为扩大星系团透镜样本提供了前所未有的机遇。在本研究中，我们采用基于深度学习的方法，利用Zou等人（2021）识别的星系团候选体目录，从DESI传统成像巡天中识别星系团透镜。我们的透镜查找器采用ResNet-18架构，以星系团透镜的模拟图像为正样本，以星系团尺度非透镜的观测图像为负样本进行训练。我们进行迭代操作以提高工作的完整性，即将找到的真阳性样本添加回训练集并再次训练多次。通过人工检查进一步筛选候选体，根据强透镜弧的显著性将其分为A、B、C三个等级。在审查Zou目录中的所有540,432个天体后，我们发现了485个高置信度的星系团透镜候选体，其星系团$M_{500}$范围为$10^{13.67\sim14.97}M_{\odot}$，最亮中心星系（BCG）红移范围为$0.04\sim0.89$。在排除先前研究中列出的透镜候选体后，我们识别出247个新发现的星系团透镜候选体，包括16个A级、90个B级和141个C级。该星系团透镜候选体目录已在线公开，鼓励进行后续观测以确认并深入研究这些系统。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，成功建立了星系团引力透镜候选体目录并公开，鼓励后续观测确认并深入研究这些系统。

Middle: The mock arc image to be added to the cluster image, together with the critical curves (red curve) and the caustics (green curve). The orange crosses indicate the positions of the member galaxies within the galaxy cluster, while the cyan cross indicate the source position. Right: The final mock lensing images.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们的模拟程序的一个示例，边长为\(100^{\prime\prime}\)。左图：一个选定的非透镜星系团图像。中图：将要添加到星系团图像中的模拟弧图像，以及临界曲线（红色曲线）和焦散线（绿色曲线）。橙色十字表示星系团内成员星系的位置，青色十字表示源位置。右图：最终的模拟透镜图像。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Range and distribution of parameters used to generate the mock lensed images. Distributions for parameters in this table without analytic forms are shown in Figure 2 .

figures.caption_zh: 图2：表1中无解析形式的参数分布。源有效半径的单位为角秒。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: UMAP projection of randomly selected 800 mock lenses from the training set, including the systems with red (blue star), green (blue cross), and blue (blue diamond) sources defined in our manuscript (See Section II.2 ). Red dots present the UMAP of 177 cluster-scale strong lenses from the COOL-LAMPS project (Mork et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：从训练集中随机选取的800个模拟透镜的UMAP投影，包括我们手稿中定义的红（蓝星）、绿（蓝叉）和蓝（蓝菱形）源系统（见第II.2节）。红点表示来自COOL-LAMPS项目（Mork等人，2025）的177个星系团尺度强透镜的UMAP。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: The cross-entropy loss on the training and validation sets over 200 training epochs with two cases in the final iteration of our training. In Case 1, we adopt Adam optimizer, configured with a batch size of 32, a learning rate of \(3\times 10^{-6}\) , and a weight decay of \(1\times 10^{-1}\) . Moreover, in Case 2, We use a initial learning rate of \(1\times 10^{-4}\) , a final learning rate of \(1\times 10^{-5}\) , a weight decay of \(1\times 10^{-2}\) , with Cosine Annealing. The vertical dashed line at epoch 20 and 90 indicates the early stopping points we selected in the two cases, which is the highest point of the AUC (Case 2), or the highest AUC before the training loss become abnormal (Case 1). Middle: The Area Under the ROC curve as a function of epoch in the same training session. Right: The derivative of AUC as a function of epoch in the same training session.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：在训练的最后一次迭代中，两种情况下训练集和验证集在200个训练周期上的交叉熵损失。在情况1中，我们采用Adam优化器，批大小为32，学习率为\(3\times 10^{-6}\)，权重衰减为\(1\times 10^{-1}\)。此外，在情况2中，我们使用初始学习率\(1\times 10^{-4}\)，最终学习率\(1\times 10^{-5}\)，权重衰减\(1\times 10^{-2}\)，并采用余弦退火。在周期20和90处的垂直虚线表示我们在两种情况下选择的早停点，即AUC的最高点（情况2），或训练损失变得异常之前的最高AUC（情况1）。中图：同一训练过程中ROC曲线下面积随周期的变化。右图：同一训练过程中AUC的导数随周期的变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison of the performance of our classifier evaluated with validation and testing sets separately. The left panel shows the ROC curve (orange line) of our classifier on the validation set containing our mock images with the area under the curve (AUC=0.939). And the ROC curve (blue line) of our classifier on the testing set containing the lens candidates from the COOL-LAMPS project (Mork et al. , 2025 ) with the area under the curve (AUC=0.722). The right panel shows the PR curve for the above two cases. We also mark the threshold (0.986) adopted in last iteration with red stars.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们的分类器在验证集和测试集上分别评估的性能比较。左图显示我们的分类器在包含模拟图像的验证集上的ROC曲线（橙色线），曲线下面积（AUC=0.939）。以及我们的分类器在包含来自COOL-LAMPS项目（Mork等人，2025）的透镜候选体的测试集上的ROC曲线（蓝色线），曲线下面积（AUC=0.722）。右图显示上述两种情况的PR曲线。我们还用红色星号标记了最后一次迭代中采用的阈值（0.986）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Performance of our classifier along with the interations. Left Panel shows the cumulative number at each iteration, shown for all candidates and separately for the three grades. The middle and right panels shows the Purity and completeness when applying our classifier to the testing set containing the lens candidates from the COOL-LAMPS project.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：我们的分类器在迭代过程中的性能。左图显示每次迭代的累积数量，包括所有候选体以及分别按三个等级显示。中图和右图显示将我们的分类器应用于包含来自COOL-LAMPS项目的透镜候选体的测试集时的纯度和完整性。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Statistics of candidates discovered during iterations (Iter.), including our threshold to select the top 4000 samples (Thresh.); the lowest score for our newly discovered candidates (Thresh.TP); the number of our newly discovered candidates (New) and cumulative candidates (Cum.), and the cumulative candidates with Grade A to Grade C; the purity (Purity) and completeness (Compl.) on the testing set made by COOL-LAMPS strong lensing (Mork et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：迭代过程中发现的候选体统计，包括我们选择前4000个样本的阈值（Thresh.）；我们新发现候选体的最低分数（Thresh.TP）；我们新发现候选体的数量（New）和累积候选体数量（Cum.），以及A级到C级的累积候选体数量；在由COOL-LAMPS强透镜（Mork等人，2025）制作的测试集上的纯度（Purity）和完整性（Compl.）。

title: GOALS-JWST: Resolved multi-phase molecular gas in IRAS 20551-4250 using JWST and ALMA
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS, 18 pages, 15 figures, 1 table
summary: Studying the content and distribution of molecular gas provides key insights into how feedback from Active Galactic Nuclei (AGN) and star formation influences galaxy evolution, since molecular gas is the primary fuel for star formation. Ultra-Luminous Infrared Galaxies (ULIRGs) are ideal candidates to study how AGN and/or starbursts affect the interstellar medium due to their intense AGN and star forming activity. We present spatially-resolved multi-phase molecular gas study of IRAS20551-4250, a nearby ($z=0.0429$) ULIRG, using JWST/MIRI-MRS and ALMA. Mid-infrared diagnostics do not rule out the presence of AGN in IRAS20551-4250. [OIII]$λ$5007 in VLT/MUSE data reveal ionised gas outflows with $w_{80}^{\rm [OIII]} \sim 790$ km s$^{-1}$ and $\dot{M}_{\rm out}^{\rm[OIII]}<0.01$ M$_{\odot}$ yr$^{-1}$. No outflows are observed in either molecular phases. JWST/MIRI-MRS data reveal several rotational transitions of warm H$_{2}$ (T$\sim500-1400$ K) within the central $\sim4\times4$ kpc$^{2}$ region. Excitation temperature maps suggest that the warm H$_{2}$ is primarily heated by UV radiation from the central source. The CO-based cold molecular component dominates the molecular gas mass, accounting for $>$95% of the total molecular gas mass. Warm H$_{2}$ maps show two tidal tails and the velocity centroid maps show disturbed, non-rotational motions and a systematic gradient across the field-of-view, similar to that of ALMA CO-based cold molecular gas and consistent with a late-stage merger. Together, our analysis indicate that the molecular gas composition in IRAS20551-4250 is consistent with ongoing star formation in the host galaxy and the outflows observed in ionised gas phase appear insufficient to expel the molecular gas or quench ongoing star formation.

AI.tldr: 对近邻ULIRG星系IRAS20551-4250的多相分子气体研究，结合JWST/MIRI-MRS和ALMA观测，发现电离气体外流较弱，不足以驱逐分子气体或抑制恒星形成
AI.motivation: 研究分子气体的含量和分布对于理解AGN和恒星形成反馈如何影响星系演化至关重要。ULIRG星系因其强烈的AGN和恒星形成活动，是研究这些过程的理想对象
AI.method: 使用JWST/MIRI-MRS和ALMA对近邻ULIRG星系IRAS20551-4250进行空间分辨的多相分子气体研究，结合VLT/MUSE数据分析电离气体外流
AI.result: 1. 中红外诊断不排除AGN存在；2. 电离气体外流速度约790 km/s，质量流失率<0.01 M⊙/yr；3. 分子相未观测到外流；4. 暖H₂主要受中央源UV辐射加热；5. 冷分子气体占分子气体总质量>95%；6. 气体运动显示晚期并合特征
AI.conclusion: IRAS20551-4250的分子气体组成与宿主星系中持续的恒星形成一致，观测到的电离气体外流强度不足以驱逐分子气体或抑制正在进行的恒星形成

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 alma, jwst, molecular, molecular gas 等主题/作者匹配。

title: Direct detection of cool molecular gas in a star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS. Main text: 17 pages, 6 figures
summary: We investigate the molecular gas content and interstellar medium (ISM) conditions of REBELS-25, a massive, star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$. Deep VLA Q-band and ALMA Band 3 observations reveal CO(3-2) and CO(7-6) emission (both at $\sim3.5σ$), and provide an upper limit on [C I](2-1). From the CMB-corrected CO(3-2) flux-representing the highest-redshift detection of a low-$J$ CO transition to date-we derive a molecular gas mass of $M_{\rm mol}=(1.0\pm0.4)\times10^{11}\,(α_{\rm CO}/(3\,$M$_{\odot}$(K$\,$\kms$\,$pc$^2)^{-1}))\,$M$_{\odot}$, directly confirming the presence of a very massive gas reservoir only $\simeq700\,$Myr after the Big Bang. This implies an extreme gas fraction of $f_{\rm gas}\simeq0.95$, a gas-to-dust ratio of $δ_{\rm GDR}\simeq6\times10^2$, and a depletion timescale of $τ_{\rm dep}\simeq1.2\,$Gyr, broadly consistent with extrapolated scaling relations for main-sequence galaxies at lower redshift. Using the radiative transfer code TUNER, we self-consistently model CO and dust continuum emission in the context of the significant CMB background, constraining ISM properties and recovering $M_{\rm mol}= (1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})\times10^{11}\,$M$_{\odot}$, independent of assumptions about $r_{31}$ and $α_{\rm CO}$. We further discuss the use of alternative molecular gas tracers at early epochs. Combining CO and [C II] measurements, we infer an empirical [C II]-to-H$_2$ conversion factor of $α_{\rm [C II]}=(60\pm25)\,$M$_{\odot}$/L$_{\odot}$, suggesting [C II] remains a viable molecular gas tracer in the Epoch of Reionization. These results demonstrate the detectability of low-$J$ CO emission even at $z>7$, paving the way for next-generation facilities, and provide critical insights into the rapid mass assembly of galaxies during the first billion years of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过探测z=7.31星系REBELS-25的CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，确认了宇宙大爆炸后仅7亿年就存在一个极端巨大的分子气体库（约10¹¹ M☉），气体分数高达95%，并验证了[C II]作为早期宇宙分子气体示踪剂的可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索早期宇宙（再电离时代）星系的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，以理解星系在宇宙最初十亿年内的快速质量积累过程。
AI.method: 利用VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，结合辐射传输代码TUNER自洽建模CO和尘埃连续谱发射，并考虑宇宙微波背景（CMB）的影响。
AI.result: 探测到CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（均约3.5σ），获得分子气体质量约1.0×10¹¹ M☉（依赖α_CO假设）或1.8×10¹¹ M☉（通过TUNER建模），气体分数约0.95，气体尘埃比约600，消耗时标约1.2 Gyr，并推导出[C II]-H₂转换因子为60±25 M☉/L☉。
AI.conclusion: 该工作直接证实了z>7星系中低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代观测设施铺平道路，并表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂，揭示了早期星系快速质量积累的关键信息。

recommendation.reason: 该论文直接探测z=7.31星系REBELS-25的分子气体，与用户Zotero库中高权重的分子气体、星际介质、ALMA、尘埃、早期星系等主题高度吻合；作者包括a pallottini、manuel aravena、a ferrara等核心作者，且研究问题（早期星系气体含量、星际介质条件）与用户兴趣方向一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了REBELS-25的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，这是一个红移z=7.31的大质量恒星形成星系。深度VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测揭示了CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（两者均为~3.5σ），并提供了[C I](2-1)的上限。根据经过宇宙微波背景修正的CO(3-2)通量——这是迄今为止对低J CO跃迁的最高红移探测——我们推导出分子气体质量为M_mol=(1.0±0.4)×10^11 (α_CO/(3 M_⊙ (K km s pc^2)^{-1})) M_⊙，直接证实了大爆炸后仅约700 Myr存在一个巨大的气体储库。这意味着极端的气体分数f_gas≈0.95、气尘比δ_GDR≈6×10^2以及消耗时标τ_dep≈1.2 Gyr，与较低红移主序星系的推断标度关系大致一致。利用辐射传输代码TUNER，我们在显著宇宙微波背景的背景下自洽地模拟了CO和尘埃连续谱发射，约束了星际介质性质，并恢复了M_mol=(1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})×10^11 M_⊙，独立于关于r_31和α_CO的假设。我们进一步讨论了早期宇宙中替代分子气体示踪剂的使用。结合CO和[C II]测量，我们推断出经验性的[C II]-H_2转换因子α_[C II]=(60±25) M_⊙/L_⊙，表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂。这些结果证明了即使在z>7时低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代设施铺平了道路，并提供了对宇宙历史最初十亿年内星系快速质量积累的关键见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该工作直接证实了z>7星系中低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代观测设施铺平道路，并表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂，揭示了早期星系快速质量积累的关键信息。

( 2023 ) , [4] Algera et al. ( 2024a ) , [5] Inami et al. ( 2022 ) , [6] Stefanon et al. (in prep), [7] Fisher et al. ( 2026 ) , [8] Rowland et al. ( 2026 ) .

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectra of REBELS-25 showing the detected line emission of CO(3–2) ( top panel ) and CO(7–6) together with the undetected [C i ](2–1) emission ( bottom panel ). In each panel, we show the data presented in this paper as an aqua histogram and the respective ± 1 ​ σ \pm 1\sigma as a grey shaded area. We also display a comparison with the [C ii ] spectrum which is detected at high S/N in this source (yellow hatched histogram), rescaled to match the amplitude of the CO emission. Vertical dash-dotted lines and shaded areas show the expected frequency and ± 1 × \pm 1\times FWHM [ C ​ ii ] {}_{\rm{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}} region of each line based on the [C ii ]-based redshift of the source. Red lines show the best-fit Gaussian to the CO line when leaving all parameters free, while orange lines show the best-fit to the [C ii ] data rescaled to the amplitude of the CO emission. In the top panel, there are some gaps in the CO(3–2) data due to fully flagged channels at the edge of spectral windows.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：REBELS-25的光谱，显示探测到的CO(3–2)（上图）和CO(7–6)以及未探测到的[C i](2–1)发射（下图）。在每个面板中，我们以浅蓝色直方图显示本文呈现的数据，并以灰色阴影区域显示相应的±1σ。我们还展示了与[C ii]光谱的比较，该光谱在该源中以高信噪比探测到（黄色阴影直方图），已重新缩放以匹配CO发射的振幅。垂直点划线及阴影区域显示了基于源[C ii]红移的每条线的预期频率和±1×FWHM_[C ii]区域。红线显示当所有参数自由时CO线的最佳拟合高斯，而橙线显示重新缩放至CO发射振幅的[C ii]数据的最佳拟合。在上图中，由于光谱窗口边缘的完全标记通道，CO(3–2)数据中存在一些间隙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Black contours ( [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3]\sigma ) show the velocity-integrated emission of CO(3–2) ( left panel ) and of CO(7–6) ( right panel ) overlaid on the [C ii ] moment 0 map obtained from the REBELS large program data. We also show the contours for the [C ii ] emission (white, [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 , 5 , 12 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3,5,12]\sigma ) and ALMA band 6 continuum tracing the dust emission (orange, [ − 3 , − 2 , 2 , 3 , 5 ] ​ σ [-3,-2,2,3,5]\sigma ). Synthesized beams for each dataset are shown as ellipses of the corresponding colour in the bottom left corner of the plot. The positions of the peak of the detected CO lines are consistent with the known position of the source.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：黑色等值线（[-3,-2,2,3]σ）显示CO(3–2)（左图）和CO(7–6)（右图）的速度积分发射，叠加在从REBELS大型计划数据获得的[C ii]矩0图上。我们还显示了[C ii]发射（白色，[-3,-2,2,3,5,12]σ）和追踪尘埃发射的ALMA波段6连续谱（橙色，[-3,-2,2,3,5]σ）的等值线。每个数据集的合成波束在图的左下角以相应颜色的椭圆显示。探测到的CO线峰值位置与已知的源位置一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Molecular gas depletion timescale as a function of redshift for galaxies across cosmic time (adapted from Zavala et al. , 2022 ) . The large symbols mark the values derived for REBELS-25, assuming the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 and 1 (magenta and aqua star, respectively); for clarity, the aqua star has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. Both values are broadly consistent with the extrapolation to z ∼ 7 z\sim 7 of the best-fit relation for main-sequence (MS) galaxies from Tacconi et al. ( 2020 ) (solid purple line). The dashed maroon line represents the corresponding fit from the same study for starburst (SB) galaxies. Blue and red circles indicate the individual sources in their respective MS and SB samples. The dash-dotted line shows the relation from Sommovigo et al. ( 2022b , a ) based on the evolution of mean baryonic accretion rates onto dark matter halos in dark-matter–only simulations. The hatched gray boxes mark the typical range of values derived for MS galaxies at z ∼ 4 − 6 z\sim 4-6 from [C ii ]-based gas masses in the ALPINE survey (Dessauges-Zavadsky et al. , 2020 ) , while the black ones mark the range of values derived from [C ii ]-based gas masses for the REBELS sample (Aravena et al. , 2024 ) . Additional high-redshift measurements from the literature are shown for comparison: the orange circle represents the lensed MS galaxy studied in Zavala et al. ( 2022 ) , the yellow hexagon represents HZ10 from Pavesi et al. ( 2019 ) , and green open triangles indicate SPT-selected DSFGs from Aravena et al. ( 2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：宇宙时间中星系分子气体消耗时标随红移的变化（改编自Zavala等人，2022）。大符号标记了REBELS-25推导的值，假设经过CMB修正的CO光度和α_CO=3（洋红色星）和1（浅蓝色星）；为清晰起见，浅蓝色星在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。两个值与Tacconi等人（2020）对主序星系最佳拟合关系外推到z~7（实紫线）大致一致。虚线栗色线表示同一研究对星暴星系的相应拟合。蓝色和红色圆圈分别表示其主序和星暴样本中的个别源。点划线表示Sommovigo等人（2022b, a）基于暗物质仅模拟中暗物质晕平均重子吸积率演化的关系。阴影灰色框标记了ALPINE巡测中基于[C ii]气体质量在z~4-6主序星系的典型值范围（Dessauges-Zavadsky等人，2020），而黑色框标记了REBELS样本中基于[C ii]气体质量的值范围（Aravena等人，2024）。文献中的其他高红移测量值也显示用于比较：橙色圆圈代表Zavala等人（2022）研究的透镜主序星系，黄色六边形代表Pavesi等人（2019）的HZ10，绿色空心三角形代表Aravena等人（2016）的SPT选择DSFG。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Dust spectral energy distribution (SED; left panel ) and CO spectral line energy distribution (SLED; right panel ) of REBELS-25 derived by fitting the observed continuum and line fluxes (black points for detections, arrows for 1 ​ σ 1\sigma upper limits) self-consistently with the TUNER model. The black dashed lines represent the best-fit median model to the data given the priors, while the gray shaded regions show the 16th–84th percentile ranges. Coloured dotted lines represent the contribution of a few individual molecular gas density components, as described in the legend (and scaled up for visibility). The CO SLED in the model peaks around J ≃ 5 J\simeq 5 , consistent with moderately excited molecular gas conditions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：REBELS-25的尘埃光谱能量分布（左图）和CO谱线能量分布（右图），通过使用TUNER模型自洽拟合观测到的连续谱和线通量（黑色点表示探测，箭头表示1σ上限）得出。黑色虚线表示给定先验下数据的最佳拟合中值模型，而灰色阴影区域显示第16-84百分位范围。彩色虚线表示几个个别分子气体密度成分的贡献，如图例所述（并缩放以提高可见性）。模型中的CO谱线能量分布在J≃5附近达到峰值，与中等激发的分子气体条件一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Evolution of the [C ii ]-to-H 2 conversion factor ( α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} ) as a function of redshift. We include measurements drawn from the literature for main-sequence galaxies (MS), starburst galaxies (SB) and Lymann break analogues (LBA) (Stacey et al. , 1991 ; Ferkinhoff et al. , 2014 ; Huynh et al. , 2014 ; Magdis et al. , 2014 ; Capak et al. , 2015 ; Cormier et al. , 2015 ; Gullberg et al. , 2015 ; Schaerer et al. , 2015 ; Madden et al. , 2016 ; Accurso et al. , 2017 ; Contursi et al. , 2017 ; Hughes et al. , 2017 ; Zanella et al. , 2018 ; Rizzo et al. , 2020 , 2021 ) . The horizontal lines and shaded regions represent the mean and 1 σ \sigma scatter of the empirical α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} calibrations from Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) (pink, solid line) and Zhao et al. ( 2024 ) (cyan, dashed line), and the median of the sample studied in Rizzo et al. ( 2021 ) (cornflower blue, dash-dotted line). The large star symbols indicate the α [ C ​ ii ] \alpha_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} values we derive for REBELS-25 using the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and assuming either α CO = 3 \alpha_{\rm CO}=3 (magenta) or α CO = 1 \alpha_{\rm CO}=1 (aqua). The yellow and orange hexagons both refer to HZ10 (see text; Pavesi et al. , 2019 ; Algera et al. , 2025a ) , the latter has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. The values derived for REBELS-25 are broadly consistent with most low- and intermediate-redshift studies, suggesting that the [C ii ] line remains an effective, though scattered, tracer of the molecular gas reservoir even at z > 7 z>7 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：[C ii]-H_2转换因子（α_[C ii]）随红移的演化。我们包括了文献中主序星系、星暴星系和莱曼断裂类似体的测量值（Stacey等人，1991；Ferkinhoff等人，2014；Huynh等人，2014；Magdis等人，2014；Capak等人，2015；Cormier等人，2015；Gullberg等人，2015；Schaerer等人，2015；Madden等人，2016；Accurso等人，2017；Contursi等人，2017；Hughes等人，2017；Zanella等人，2018；Rizzo等人，2020，2021）。水平线和阴影区域表示来自Zanella等人（2018）（粉色实线）和Zhao等人（2024）（青色虚线）的经验α_[C ii]校准的均值和1σ弥散，以及Rizzo等人（2021）研究样本的中值（矢车菊蓝点划线）。大星符号表示我们为REBELS-25推导的α_[C ii]值，使用经过CMB修正的CO光度并假设α_CO=3（洋红色）或α_CO=1（浅蓝色）。黄色和橙色六边形均指HZ10（见正文；Pavesi等人，2019；Algera等人，2025a），后者在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。REBELS-25推导的值与大多数低和中等红移研究大致一致，表明[C ii]线即使在z>7时仍是分子气体储库的有效但弥散的示踪剂。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Resolved analysis of the [C ii ]– M gas M_{\rm gas} relation in REBELS-25 following the prescription of Vallini et al. ( 2025 ) based on simulated galaxies (see text for details). Maps of: [C ii ] surface brightness ( Σ [ C ​ ii ] \Sigma_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} , in L ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 ) derived from the high–S/N, high–resolution ( ∼ 0.14 ​ ″ / 700 \sim 0.14\arcsec/700\, pc) ALMA data ( left panel ); resolved [C ii ]-to-H 2 conversion factor ( W [ C ​ ii ] W_{\rm[C\,\textsc{ii}]} , in (M ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc ) − 2 / ( {}^{-2})/( L ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 )) computed using Eq. 11 in V25 ( central panel ); resulting gas surface density ( Σ gas \Sigma_{\rm gas} , in M ⊙ {}_{\odot}\, kpc -2 ; right panel ). In each panel, we show the synthesized beam of the [C ii ] data as an ellipse in the bottom left corner and the contours of the [C ii ] emission at a 2 ​ σ 2\sigma level.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：遵循Vallini等人（2025）基于模拟星系的处方（详见正文），REBELS-25中[C ii]-M_gas关系的分辨分析。图：[C ii]面亮度（Σ_[C ii]，单位为L_⊙ kpc^{-2}），来自高信噪比、高分辨率（~0.14″/700 pc）的ALMA数据（左图）；分辨的[C ii]-H_2转换因子（W_[C ii]，单位为(M_⊙ kpc)^{-2}/(L_⊙ kpc^{-2})），使用V25中的公式11计算（中图）；由此产生的气体面密度（Σ_gas，单位为M_⊙ kpc^{-2}；右图）。在每个面板中，我们在左下角以椭圆显示[C ii]数据的合成波束，并以2σ水平显示[C ii]发射的等值线。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of observational measurements and gas mass estimates for REBELS-25. The table lists synthesized beamwidth ( θ HPBW \theta_{\rm HPBW} ), observed line luminosities, molecular and total cold gas mass estimates derived using different tracers and assumptions (all CO-based estimates include the CMB correction; see Sec. 3.3.1 ), and the resulting [C ii ]–to–H 2 conversion factors.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：REBELS-25的观测测量和气体质量估计总结。该表列出了合成波束宽度（θ_HPBW）、观测到的线光度、使用不同示踪剂和假设推导的分子和总冷气体质量估计（所有基于CO的估计均包括CMB修正；见第3.3.1节），以及由此产生的[C ii]-H_2转换因子。

title: DREAMS. JWST Spectroscopy of a $z=8.3$ Galaxy with an ALMA Dust Continuum Detection: Early Dust, Very High $T_{\rm dust}$, and a Multi-wavelength [OIII] Ratio Discrepancy
summary: We present a deep DREAMS JWST/NIRSpec MSA medium-grating spectrum of MACS0416-Y1, a galaxy at $z=8.312$ with the highest-redshift ALMA dust continuum detection to date, in order to characterize its properties together with archival IFU and ALMA data. The deep NIRSpec spectrum reveals a broad H$β$ line with a width of $\sim1100$ km s$^{-1}$. We interpret it as a broad-line AGN whose line diagnostics are consistent with AGN activity across its clumpy structure, given the absence of little red dot signatures. MACS0416-Y1 clearly shows [OIII]4363 emission, suggesting a moderately low metallicity of $12+\log(\mathrm{O/H})=7.86^{+0.09}_{-0.08}$ ($0.15~Z_\odot$). The combination of [CII]158$μ$m and dust continuum emission indicates low dust mass ratios of $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm gas})=-3.60^{+0.29}_{-0.22}$ and $\log (M_{\rm dust}/M_{\rm metal})=-0.95^{+0.29}_{-0.20}$. Because the metallicity of MACS0416-Y1 is around the critical metallicity of $0.1\textrm{-}0.2~Z_\odot$, the system is expected to undergo dust growth, explaining these low dust mass ratios as well as its small dust mass, $M_{\rm dust}\sim10^6~M_\odot$. The intense UV radiation from the AGN may contribute to a high dust temperature of $T_{\rm dust}\simeq 91^{+62}_{-35}$ K, boosting the dust-continuum emission above the ALMA detection limit despite the small $M_{\rm dust}$ at $z>8$. We find a very high total flux ratio of [OIII]88$μ$m/[OIII]5007 = $0.26 \pm 0.06$ in MACS0416-Y1, above predictions from single ionized nebular models at any electron density. This discrepancy suggests that the [OIII]88$μ$m and [OIII]5007 trace largely distinct regions, with the optical line suppressed in dusty nebulae, and thus requires careful interpretation when combining optical and infrared emission lines in JWST+ALMA studies.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用JWST/NIRSpec对z=8.312的星系MACS0416-Y1进行观测，发现其存在宽线AGN、中等低金属丰度、极低尘埃质量比，以及异常的[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比，表明光学和红外发射线示踪了不同区域。
AI.motivation: 为了表征目前红移最高的ALMA尘埃连续谱探测星系MACS0416-Y1的物理性质，结合JWST、IFU和ALMA多波段数据，特别是理解早期宇宙中AGN活动、尘埃性质和金属丰度的相互作用。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRSpec MSA中分辨率光栅光谱观测，结合存档IFU和ALMA数据，分析Hβ宽线、[OIII]4363发射线、[CII]158μm、尘埃连续谱以及[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比等多波段谱线特征。
AI.result: 发现宽线AGN（Hβ线宽~1100 km/s）、金属丰度12+log(O/H)=7.86（0.15太阳丰度）、极低尘埃质量比(log(M_dust/M_gas)~-3.60, log(M_dust/M_metal)~-0.95)、尘埃质量~10^6 M⊙、尘埃温度~91 K，以及非常高的[OIII]88μm/[OIII]5007流量比0.26±0.06。
AI.conclusion: MACS0416-Y1的金属丰度接近临界值（0.1-0.2太阳丰度），正处于尘埃增长阶段；AGN强紫外辐射导致尘埃温度升高；[OIII]88μm与[OIII]5007示踪不同区域，光学线在尘埃星云中被抑制，因此在JWST+ALMA联合研究中需谨慎解读光学与红外发射线数据。

title: Cold molecular gas distribution and kinematics in the low-metallicity dusty starburst of Mrk 996 resolved with ALMA
comment: 12+2 pages, 9 figures, and 5 tables. Submitted to A&A
summary: Detecting cold molecular gas in metal-poor starbursts remains a major challenge. Low carbon and oxygen abundances hinder CO formation, while low dust content reduces shielding against UV photodissociation. Consequently, CO, the main tracer of molecular gas, becomes faint or undetectable. We study the spatial distribution and kinematics of cold molecular gas in Mrk 996, a nearby low-mass Wolf-Rayet galaxy hosting a dense, low-metallicity (about 1/5 solar) and nitrogen-enriched nuclear starburst with complex ionized gas kinematics. Using ALMA observations of CO(1-0) and CO(2-1), we map the morphology and kinematics of the molecular gas and compare them with optical and UV data, tracing the ionized gas and young stellar populations. We detect compact CO clouds within 800 pc of the starburst, spatially offset from the nuclear super star cluster (SSC) and the most highly ionized regions. The CO lines are narrow and supersonic, exhibiting velocity gradients with a mild global blueshift, indicating dynamically perturbed gas without evidence for fast outflows, in contrast with the highly ionized phase. The global CO(2-1)/CO(1-0) ratio is low (R21 ~ 0.3), consistent with subthermal excitation. The millimeter continuum peaks at the SSC, while CO emission is displaced toward obscured regions, suggesting it traces dense shielded clumps. ALMA recovers about half of the single-dish flux, indicating the presence of extended, low-surface-brightness molecular gas. Using a metallicity-dependent CO-to-H2 conversion factor, we infer a molecular gas mass of a few 10^7 solar masses. The molecular gas is only weakly coupled to the stellar feedback that dominates the ionized phase. Our results support a multiphase scenario in which dense molecular clumps survive in shielded regions, while CO is photodissociated in their envelopes, leaving a significant CO-dark H2 component (Abridged).

AI.tldr: 在低金属丰度星暴星系Mrk 996中，ALMA观测发现CO分子气体呈紧凑分布，与核区超星团空间分离，显示亚热激发特征，存在大量CO暗H2气体成分
AI.motivation: 研究低金属丰度星暴星系中冷分子气体的探测挑战，因为低碳氧丰度抑制CO形成，低尘埃含量减少对紫外光解离的屏蔽，导致主要分子气体示踪剂CO变得微弱或无法探测
AI.method: 使用ALMA观测CO(1-0)和CO(2-1)谱线，绘制分子气体的形态和运动学特征，并与光学和UV数据（示踪电离气体和年轻星族）进行比较分析
AI.result: 在星暴区800 pc范围内探测到紧凑CO云，与核区超星团和高电离区域空间偏移；CO谱线窄且超音速，显示轻微整体蓝移的速度梯度；CO(2-1)/CO(1-0)比值低(R21~0.3)，符合亚热激发；毫米连续谱在超星团处最强，而CO发射偏向遮蔽区域；ALMA仅恢复约一半的单天线流量，表明存在扩展的低表面亮度分子气体
AI.conclusion: 支持多相场景：致密分子团块在遮蔽区域存活，而CO在其包层中被光解离，留下显著的CO暗H2成分；分子气体与主导电离相位的恒星反馈仅弱耦合

title: The ionised interstellar medium of DSFGs revealed by JWST/NIRSpec and ALMA: Super-solar metallicity, low ionisation parameters and, typical electron densities
comment: 18 pages (excluding appendices), 9 figures, submitted to A&A Comments welcome
summary: We present a detailed study of near-infrared (2-4$\rm μ$m) JWST/NIRSpec spectra of 48 high-redshift ($z=2.53^{+1.32}_{-0.70}$) galaxies detected with ALMA at $>3σ$. From a multi-wavelength SED analysis we establish the sample has a a median stellar mass of $\rm\log_{10}(M_\ast/M_\odot)=10.8\pm0.1$ and dust mass of $\rm\log_{10}(M_{\rm d}/M_\odot)=8.7\pm0.1$, covering a broad range of far-infrared luminosity $\rm (\log_{10}(L_{FIR}/L_\odot)=10.9-12.7)$. The majority of sources show no signs of AGN activity, with 40% having either X-ray counterparts $(\rm L_{Xc}>10^{42}erg/s)$, elevated optical line ratios, or broad (FWHM>800 km/s) H$α$ profiles, although we note this is a lower limit due to the stochastic placement of NIRSpec slits. We establish the sample has a median gas-phase metallicity of $12+\log({\rm O/H})=8.71\pm0.02$, as derived from the [NII]/H$α$ ratio, with the most FIR-luminous galaxies ($\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)>12$) falling $0.15\pm0.03$dex above the fundamental metallicity relation. From the [SII] emission-line doublet ratio, we measure a median electron density of $\log_{10}(n_{\rm e}/{\rm cm}^{-3})=2.53\pm0.07$ consistent with less-massive, star-forming, galaxies at the same epoch. For nine galaxies with [OII] and H$β$ detections (median $\rm\log_{10}(L_{\rm FIR}/L_\odot)=11.81\pm0.15$), we derive a median observed (dust-uncorrected) ionisation parameter of $\rm\log_{10}(U)=-2.84\pm0.06$. Our results indicate that luminous far-infrared galaxies are massive, chemically evolved systems that appear to deviate from the standard dust and metal production equilibrium observed in less obscured galaxies. This study demonstrates the synergy of JWST and ALMA in unveiling the nature of DSFGs, and highlights the need for a NIRSpec survey of uniformly selected, massive, dust-obscured, galaxies to fully characterise their interstellar medium.

AI.tldr: JWST/NIRSpec观测48个高红移ALMA星系，发现这些远红外明亮星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，偏离了标准尘埃-金属平衡关系。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移、尘埃遮蔽的恒星形成星系的性质，特别是它们的金属丰度、电子密度和电离参数，以了解这些系统的星际介质特征和演化状态。
AI.method: 使用JWST/NIRSpec获取近红外光谱(2-4μm)，结合ALMA探测，对48个高红移(z=2.53)星系进行多波段SED分析，测量金属丰度([NII]/Hα)、电子密度([SII]双线比)和电离参数([OII]/Hβ)。

AI.conclusion: 远红外明亮星系是质量大、化学演化成熟的系统，偏离了在较少尘埃遮蔽星系中观察到的标准尘埃和金属产生平衡，突显了JWST和ALMA协同研究的重要性。

title: The Early Maturity of High-Redshift Galaxies: Insights from sSFR, M/L and SFHs at z~7-14
summary: The James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) has revealed an unexpected excess of UV-bright galaxies at z>10, unaccounted for by extrapolations from pre-JWST observations and theoretical models. Understanding the physical properties and star formation histories (SFH) of high redshift systems is key to distinguish between the different proposed scenarios. We identify and analyse a sample of 2420 robust candidates at z~7-14 drawn from the ASTRODEEP-JWST dataset over ~0.2 deg^2 and model their properties with non-parametric SFHs to derive their specific star formation rate (sSFR) and stellar population properties. We find that the median sSFR and M/L remain roughly constant across the probed redshift range. We show that this result is robust against potential systematics unless a hidden population of dust-enshrouded starbursts, undetectable in current data, exists at these redshifts. In any case, the absence of observed high-sSFR systems at the highest redshifts suggests that any dust-free starburst phase must be short-lived. The observed sSFR evolution is in tension with most (though not all) theoretical models, making it a key quantity for discriminating among competing scenarios. The sample shows a wide range of physical conditions and galaxy classes, including systems with low sSFR and high mass-to-light ratios (M/L) up to z~10, indicative of already evolved galaxies only a few hundred Myr after the Big Bang, and different degrees of dust attenuation. We finally attempt to reconstruct the assembly histories of two sub-samples: a) the highest-M/L galaxies at z~7-8, which appear to have formed the bulk of their stars at least 500 Myr before observation, implying progenitors observable as UV-bright sources at z>20, and b) z>11 galaxies, which formed through stochastic SFH, remaining UV-faint for most of their early evolution, before undergoing recent (~50 Myr old) episodes of major growth.

AI.tldr: JWST观测发现z>10处存在意外多的UV亮星系，通过分析2420个z~7-14的星系样本，发现特定恒星形成率(sSFR)和质量-光度比(M/L)在红移范围内基本恒定，与多数理论模型存在矛盾。
AI.motivation: JWST观测到z>10处存在超出预期的UV亮星系，理解这些高红移系统的物理特性和恒星形成历史对于区分不同理论模型至关重要。
AI.method: 从ASTRODEEP-JWST数据集中选取2420个z~7-14的可靠候选星系，使用非参数恒星形成历史模型分析其特定恒星形成率(sSFR)和恒星种群特性。
AI.result: 发现sSFR和M/L中值在探测的红移范围内基本恒定；样本显示广泛的物理条件和星系类型，包括z~10处已演化的星系；最高M/L星系在观测前至少500Myr形成大部分恒星；z>11星系通过随机恒星形成历史形成，早期保持UV暗，近期经历主要增长。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的sSFR演化与多数理论模型存在矛盾，成为区分竞争模型的关键参数；缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明任何无尘埃星暴阶段必须是短暂的；星系形成历史呈现多样性，包括早期演化和近期增长两种模式。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）在红移z>10处发现了出乎意料的大量紫外明亮星系，这是基于JWST之前的观测外推和理论模型所未能预见的。理解高红移系统的物理性质和恒星形成历史（SFH）是区分不同提出方案的关键。我们从ASTRODEEP-JWST数据集中识别并分析了约0.2平方度范围内z~7-14的2420个稳健候选体，并使用非参数化SFH对其性质进行建模，以推导其比恒星形成率（sSFR）和星族性质。我们发现，中位sSFR和质光比（M/L）在探测的红移范围内大致保持恒定。我们表明，除非在这些红移处存在当前数据无法探测的隐藏尘埃包裹星暴群，否则这一结果对潜在系统误差是稳健的。无论如何，在最高红移处缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明，任何无尘埃星暴阶段都必须是短暂的。观测到的sSFR演化与大多数（尽管并非全部）理论模型存在矛盾，使其成为区分竞争方案的关键量。该样本展示了广泛的物理条件和星系类别，包括在z~10处具有低sSFR和高质光比（M/L）的系统，表明这些星系在大爆炸后仅几亿年就已演化，以及不同程度的尘埃消光。我们最终尝试重建两个子样本的组装历史：a) z~7-8处最高M/L的星系，它们似乎在观测前至少5亿年就形成了大部分恒星，这意味着其前体在z>20处可作为紫外明亮源被观测到；b) z>11的星系，它们通过随机SFH形成，在大部分早期演化中保持紫外暗淡，直到经历近期（约5千万年历史）的主要增长阶段。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：观测到的sSFR演化与多数理论模型存在矛盾，成为区分竞争模型的关键参数；缺乏观测到的高sSFR系统表明任何无尘埃星暴阶段必须是短暂的；星系形成历史呈现多样性，包括早期演化和近期增长两种模式。

title: Probing Infrared eXcess to Investigate Early-Universe Dust (PIXIEDust)
comment: 20 pages, 12 figures, submitted to MNRAS. Stacking methodology for community effort in dust stacks available at https://github.com/tjlcbakx/high-z-dust-stack
summary: Despite the implied presence of dust through reddened UV emission in high-redshift galaxies, no dust emission has been detected in the (sub)millimetre regime beyond $z > 8.3$. This study combines around two hundred hours of Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) and Northern Extended Millimeter Array (NOEMA) observations on ten $z > 8$ galaxies, revealing no significant dust emission down to a $1 σ$ depth of $2.0$, $2.0$, and $1.5 \,μ$Jy at rest-frame 158, 88 $μ$m, and across all the data, respectively. This constrains average dust masses to be below $< 10^{5}$ M$_{\odot}$ at $3 σ$ and dust-to-stellar mass ratios to be below $3.7 \times{} 10^{-4}$ (assuming $T_{\rm dust} = 50$ K and $β_{\rm dust} = 2.0$). Binning by redshift ($8 < z < 9.5$ and $9.5 < z < 15$), UV-continuum slope ($β_{\rm UV} \lessgtr -2$) and stellar mass ($\log_{10} M_{\ast}/{\rm M_{\odot}} \lessgtr 9$) yields similarly stringent constraints. Combined with other studies, these results are consistent with inefficient dust build-up in the $z > 8$ Universe, likely due to inefficient supernova production, limited interstellar grain growth and/or ejection by outflows. We provide data and tools online to facilitate community-wide high-redshift dust searches.

AI.tldr: 对10个z>8高红移星系进行ALMA和NOEMA观测，未探测到显著尘埃发射，约束了尘埃质量和尘埃-恒星质量比的上限，表明早期宇宙尘埃积累效率低下。
AI.motivation: 尽管高红移星系中通过红化的紫外发射暗示存在尘埃，但在z>8.3以上的（亚）毫米波段从未探测到尘埃发射。本研究旨在通过深度观测探索早期宇宙中尘埃的存在和性质。
AI.method: 结合约200小时的ALMA和NOEMA观测数据，对10个z>8星系进行分析。观测深度达到1σ灵敏度：158μm和88μm处2.0μJy，所有数据综合1.5μJy。按红移(8<z<9.5和9.5<z<15)、紫外连续谱斜率(βUV≶-2)和恒星质量(log10M*/M⊙≶9)进行分箱分析。
AI.result: 未探测到显著尘埃发射，约束平均尘埃质量在3σ置信度下低于10^5 M⊙，尘埃-恒星质量比低于3.7×10^-4（假设Tdust=50K，βdust=2.0）。分箱分析得到类似严格约束。
AI.conclusion: 结合其他研究，结果表明z>8宇宙中尘埃积累效率低下，可能原因包括超新星产生效率低、星际尘埃生长受限和/或外流导致的尘埃抛射。研究提供了在线数据和工具以促进高红移尘埃搜索。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管高红移星系中紫外发射的变红暗示了尘埃的存在，但在红移z > 8.3以上的（亚）毫米波段尚未探测到尘埃发射。本研究结合了阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）和北方扩展毫米阵列（NOEMA）对十个z > 8星系的约两百小时观测，在静止框架158微米、88微米以及所有数据中，分别未探测到显著的尘埃发射，1σ深度分别为2.0、2.0和1.5微央斯基。这限制了平均尘埃质量在3σ水平上低于10^5太阳质量，尘埃与恒星质量比低于3.7×10^{-4}（假设尘埃温度T_dust = 50 K，尘埃发射率指数β_dust = 2.0）。按红移（8 < z < 9.5和9.5 < z < 15）、紫外连续谱斜率（β_UV ≶ -2）和恒星质量（log10 M_*/M_⊙ ≶ 9）进行分箱分析，也得出了同样严格的限制。结合其他研究，这些结果与z > 8宇宙中尘埃积累效率低下的情况一致，可能原因包括超新星产生效率低、星际尘埃生长受限和/或外流导致的尘埃抛射。我们在线提供数据和工具，以促进社区范围内的高红移尘埃搜索。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：结合其他研究，结果表明z>8宇宙中尘埃积累效率低下，可能原因包括超新星产生效率低、星际尘埃生长受限和/或外流导致的尘埃抛射。研究提供了在线数据和工具以促进高红移尘埃搜索。

title: Chaotic Molecular Gas in Five Dusty Star-forming Galaxies in the Spiderweb Protocluster at $z = 2.16$
summary: Measuring the properties of cold molecular gas available for intense star formation in galaxy protoclusters at $z>2$ is a crucial step in understanding large scale structure formation. We present ALMA observations of CO(3$-$2) in five dusty star-forming galaxies within $\sim0.5-4$ cMpc of the core of the Spiderweb protocluster at $z=2.16$ to measure the molecular gas mass and kinematics in the most starbursting members of the protocluster. All five galaxies exhibit evidence for disturbed kinematics including non-Gaussian CO line profiles, irregular spatial morphology, and strong residuals when fitting the galaxies with a classical disk model. This could be indicative of an elevated merger rate in the outskirts of the mature Spiderweb protocluster, as all of the galaxies in our sample have multiple companions detected in H$α$. Both the gas fractions and the gas depletion timescales of the galaxies are similar to field relations at cosmic noon, indicative of the fact that their prodigious star formation rates are compensated by similarly high gas masses. The most massive galaxies, as well as all of the galaxies identified as X-ray AGN in previous works, have gas fractions $<30$%, compared to the sample average of 49%, indicating declining availability of gas for star formation. Finally, we find that the gas fractions and specific star formation rates decline with distance from the Spiderweb Galaxy, supporting the reversal of the SFR density--radius relation in high-redshift protoclusters.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA观测蜘蛛网原星系团外围5个尘埃星系中的CO(3-2)，发现它们具有 disturbed 运动学特征，暗示高合并率；气体分数和消耗时标与场星系相似，但最质量星系和X射线AGN的气体分数低于30%，且气体分数和比恒星形成率随距蜘蛛网星系距离增加而下降，支持高红移原星系团中SFR密度-半径关系的反转。
AI.motivation: 测量z>2原星系团中可用于剧烈恒星形成的冷分子气体性质，是理解大尺度结构形成的关键步骤。
AI.method: 利用ALMA对蜘蛛网原星系团(z=2.16)核心周围~0.5-4 cMpc范围内的5个尘埃星暴星系进行CO(3-2)观测，测量其分子气体质量和运动学。
AI.result: 5个星系均显示 disturbed 运动学（非高斯CO线轮廓、不规则空间形态、经典盘模型拟合残差大）；气体分数和消耗时标与场星系相似；最质量星系和X射线AGN气体分数<30%（样品平均49%）；气体分数和sSFR随距蜘蛛网星系距离增加而下降。
AI.conclusion: 原星系团外围存在升高的并合率；气体供应充足支撑了极高的恒星形成速率；最质量星系和AGN正在失去气体储备；支持原星系团中SFR密度-半径关系的反转。

title: A Deep ALMA Survey of the Redshift Distribution of Dusty Star-forming Galaxies
comment: 22 pages, 11 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to ApJ. Comments welcome
summary: We present an Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) spectroscopic follow-up survey of an 870 $μ$m-selected sample of dusty star-forming galaxies (DSFGs) in the GOODS-S field. We use these linescans to identify or confirm spectroscopic redshifts (spec-zs) for 20 sources. Including spec-zs from the literature, there are now secure or tentative spec-zs for 52 out of 75 DSFGs (69%). At $f_{870}>2.5$ mJy, the sample is 97% spectroscopically complete, allowing us to model the full DSFG redshift distribution down to nearly the confusion limit for a 15-m telescope at 850 $μ$m. This is the highest completeness for an unbiased sample at this flux limit to date. We find that nearly all of the DSFGs in our sample that were targeted with JWST/NIRSpec were spectroscopically identified, without much dependence on near-infrared or submillimeter flux or redshift. However, only 29% of our sample have JWST spectroscopic coverage. We use the spec-zs to evaluate various photometric redshift (photo-z) estimates, finding that all methods exhibit an outlier fraction of at least $>20$%. Nearly all of the photo-z methods tend to overshoot the redshifts, leading to overestimates of the number of DSFGs at high redshift ($z>4$). Our results suggest that $\lesssim10$% of $f_{870} \gtrsim 2$ mJy DSFGs lie at $z>4$ and $\lesssim2$% lie at $z>5$, reflecting a steep decline in the abundance of massive dusty galaxies in the first 1.5 Gyr.

AI.tldr: ALMA对GOODS-S区域870μm选出的尘埃恒星形成星系进行光谱后续观测，获得69%的光谱红移确认率，发现高红移（z>4）的尘埃星系比例低于10%，表明早期宇宙中大质量尘埃星系数量急剧下降。
AI.motivation: 研究尘埃恒星形成星系（DSFGs）的红移分布，特别是高红移（z>4）星系的比例，以了解早期宇宙中大质量尘埃星系的形成和演化。
AI.method: 使用ALMA对GOODS-S区域870μm选出的DSFGs进行光谱后续观测，结合文献中的光谱红移数据，评估各种测光红移方法的准确性，并分析红移分布。
AI.result: 获得了52/75个DSFGs（69%）的光谱红移确认；在f870>2.5 mJy的样本中达到97%的光谱完整性；发现所有测光红移方法都有至少20%的异常值比例；高红移DSFGs比例很低：z>4的少于10%，z>5的少于2%。
AI.conclusion: 早期宇宙中大质量尘埃星系的丰度在最初15亿年内急剧下降，高红移（z>4）尘埃星系的比例远低于之前测光红移估计的结果，表明需要更准确的光谱观测来理解星系演化。

title: Euclid Quick Data Release (Q1). The Strong Lensing Discovery Engine F -- Bright and low-redshift strong lenses
summary: We present 72 additional galaxy-galaxy strong lenses that complement the sample discovered in the Euclid Quick Release 1 data (63.1 deg^2) of the Strong Lens Discovery Engine (SLDE) papers A-E. It is shown that previous pre-selection of potential lenses, which excluded objects from the Gaia catalogue, led to missing several bright and low-redshift strong lenses, adding more than 10% new strong lens candidates compared to the previous search. In total, the catalogue includes 38 "grade A" (confident) and 34 "grade B" (probable) candidates. These lenses are identified through a combination of two independent searches for bright nearby objects: one based on machine-learning models followed by expert visual inspection, and the other based solely on expert visual inspection, targeting objects not included in the initial machine-learning selection (a limitation identified only after extensive visual inspection). With these additional strong lens candidates, we augment the expected number of high-confidence candidates in the Euclid Wide Survey from previous forecasts to 120000. Detailed semi-automated lens modelling confirms at least 41 systems out of 72, a fraction consistent with that found in SLDE A (315 out of 488). These include: multiple edge-on disc lenses; sources with arcs near the lens centre; "red sources"; and an edge-on disk galaxy lensing a galaxy merger, producing two sets of lensed features, an Einstein ring and a doubly imaged component. The median redshift of these systems is $Δ$ z ~ 0.3 lower than that of the SLDE A sample.

AI.tldr: 在Euclid Quick Release 1数据中发现了72个新的星系-星系强引力透镜候选体，通过改进的搜索方法找到了之前因排除Gaia目录对象而遗漏的明亮低红移透镜，使高置信度候选体总数达到38个。
AI.motivation: 之前基于机器学习模型的预筛选排除了Gaia目录中的对象，导致遗漏了许多明亮且红移较低的强引力透镜系统。本研究旨在通过改进搜索方法，发现这些被遗漏的透镜候选体，完善Euclid巡天中的强透镜样本。
AI.method: 采用两种独立搜索方法：1）基于机器学习模型筛选后专家目视检查；2）直接对未包含在初始机器学习选择中的对象进行专家目视检查。通过半自动透镜建模对候选体进行确认。
AI.result: 共发现72个新的强透镜候选体，其中38个为"A级"（高置信度），34个为"B级"（可能）。半自动建模确认了至少41个系统。这些透镜包括：多个侧向盘状透镜、弧线靠近透镜中心的源、"红色源"、以及一个透镜星系合并的侧向盘状星系。中位红移比SLDE A样本低约0.3。
AI.conclusion: 改进的搜索方法成功发现了之前遗漏的明亮低红移强透镜，将Euclid宽视场巡天中预期的高置信度候选体数量提升至12万个。这些新增样本丰富了强透镜的多样性，为宇宙学和星系形成研究提供了宝贵资源。

title: Spatially Resolved Physical Properties of Young Star Clusters and Star-forming Clumps in the Brightest z>6 Galaxy, the Strongly Lensed Cosmic Spear at z=6.2
summary: We present spatially resolved analysis of stellar populations in the brightest $z>6$ galaxy known to date (AB mag 23), the strongly lensed MACS0308$-$zD1 (dubbed the ``Cosmic Spear'') at $z_{\rm spec}=6.2$. New JWST NIRCam imaging and high-resolution NIRSpec IFU spectroscopy span the rest-frame ultraviolet to optical. The NIRCam imaging reveals bright star-forming clumps and a tail consisting of three distinct, extremely compact star clusters that are multiply-imaged by gravitational lensing. The star clusters have effective radii of $R_{\rm{eff}} \sim 5$ pc, stellar masses of $M_{*} \sim 10^{6}-10^{7}\,M_{\odot}$, and high stellar mass surface densities of $Σ_{*} > 10^{4}\,M_{\odot}~\rm{pc}^{-2}$. While their stellar populations are very young ($\sim 5-9$ Myr), their dynamical ages exceed unity, consistent with the clusters being gravitationally bound systems. Placing the star clusters in the size vs.~stellar mass density plane, we find they occupy a region similar to other high-redshift star clusters within galaxies observed recently with JWST, being significantly more massive and denser than local star clusters. Spatially resolved analysis of the brightest clump reveals a compact, intensely star-forming core. The ionizing photon production efficiency ($ξ_{\rm{ion}}$) is slightly suppressed in this central region, potentially indicating a locally elevated Lyman continuum escape fraction facilitated by feedback-driven channels.

AI.tldr: JWST观测揭示了一个z=6.2的强引力透镜星系MACS0308-zD1（"宇宙之矛"）中的极端致密星团，这些星团半径约5pc，质量10^6-10^7太阳质量，表面密度超过10^4太阳质量/平方pc，年龄仅5-9百万年，但已形成引力束缚系统。
AI.motivation: 研究早期宇宙（z>6）中星系的恒星形成过程，特别是通过JWST的高分辨率观测来探索高红移星系中的极端致密星团形成机制，这些星团比本地星团更致密、质量更大。
AI.method: 使用JWST的NIRCam成像和NIRSpec IFU光谱仪进行观测，覆盖了从紫外到光学波段的静止框架。利用引力透镜效应放大和解析星系结构，对星团进行空间分辨分析，测量其有效半径、恒星质量、表面密度和年龄等参数。
AI.result: 发现了三个极端致密的年轻星团（Reff~5pc，M*~10^6-10^7太阳质量，Σ*>10^4太阳质量/平方pc），年龄仅5-9百万年但已形成引力束缚系统。最亮星团的核心区域显示出被抑制的电离光子产生效率，可能表明存在反馈驱动的LyC逃逸通道。
AI.conclusion: 早期宇宙中存在比本地星团更致密、质量更大的极端致密星团，这些星团在很年轻时就能形成引力束缚系统。中心区域的电离光子产生效率抑制可能暗示着反馈机制促进了LyC光子的逃逸，这对理解早期宇宙的再电离过程具有重要意义。

recommendation.reason: 论文聚焦于强引力透镜星系中极端致密星团的空间分辨研究，与用户Zotero库中强引力透镜、JWST、高红移星团、恒星形成等核心主题高度吻合。多位核心作者（Seiji Fujimoto, Yoshinobu Fudamoto, Christopher J. Conselice, Gabriel Brammer, Miroslava Dessauges-Zavadsky, Anton M. Koekemoer）直接参与，方法（JWST NIRCam/NIRSpec IFU空间分辨分析）和科学问题（早期宇宙恒星形成、星团形成机制）与用户兴趣高度一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了已知最亮的z>6星系（AB星等23），即强引力透镜星系MACS0308-zD1（称为“宇宙之矛”，光谱红移z=6.2）中恒星族群的 spatially resolved 分析。新的JWST NIRCam成像和高分辨率NIRSpec IFU光谱覆盖了从紫外到光学的静止系波段。NIRCam成像揭示了明亮的恒星形成团块和一个由三个截然不同、极其致密的星团组成的尾状结构，这些星团因引力透镜效应而成像。这些星团的有效半径约为5秒差距，恒星质量约为10^6至10^7太阳质量，恒星质量面密度超过10^4太阳质量每平方秒差距。尽管它们的恒星族群非常年轻（约5-9百万年），但它们的动力学年龄超过1，这与星团是引力束缚系统一致。将这些星团置于大小与恒星质量面密度的平面中，我们发现它们占据了与最近JWST观测到的其他高红移星系中星团相似的区域，比本地星团显著更大质量和更致密。对最亮团块的 spatially resolved 分析揭示了一个致密、强烈恒星形成的核心。该中心区域的电离光子产生效率略有抑制，可能表明由反馈驱动的通道促进了局部莱曼连续谱逃逸分数。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，早期宇宙中存在比本地星团更致密、质量更大的极端致密星团，这些星团在很年轻时就能形成引力束缚系统。中心区域的电离光子产生效率抑制可能暗示着反馈机制促进了LyC光子的逃逸，这对理解早期宇宙的再电离过程具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIRCam color image (red: F277W+F356W, green: F150W+F200W, and blue: F090W+F115W) of the Cosmic Spear, at z = 6.2 z=6.2 , in the background of galaxy cluster MACS J0308+2645 at z = 0.356 z=0.356 . The strongly-lensed galaxy (shown in the two right panels) is resolved into two main components: a pair of large, bright star-forming clumps (1 and 2), and an arc containing three distinct star clusters (3, 4, and 5) which are multiply imaged into seven sources (3a, 3b, 3c, 4a, 4b, 5a, and 5b). The top-left corner inset shows a counter-image identified from the lens model. It reveals a clumpy morphology, with three distinct substructures (lower limit). The red line represents a lensing critical curve at z = 6.2 z=6.2 , while the white lines show contours of constant magnifications.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：宇宙之矛（红移z=6.2）的NIRCam彩色图像（红色：F277W+F356W，绿色：F150W+F200W，蓝色：F090W+F115W），背景为红移z=0.356的星系团MACS J0308+2645。强透镜星系（右侧两图所示）分解为两个主要成分：一对大而明亮的恒星形成团块（1和2），以及一个包含三个不同星团（3、4和5）的弧，这些星团被多重成像为七个源（3a、3b、3c、4a、4b、5a和5b）。左上角插图为透镜模型识别出的对应像，显示团块形态，具有三个不同的子结构（下限）。红线表示红移z=6.2的透镜临界曲线，白线显示恒定放大率等高线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Results of morphological modeling using GALFIT applied to eleven NIRCam filters. In the modeling, the galaxy is decomposed into ten components: the diffuse light of the host galaxy underlying the arc (i.e., tail), two bright clumps, and seven compact sources associated with the multiple images of the star clusters. In the residual images, red, white, and blue colors are for positive, zero, and negative values, respectively. The reduced chi-square ( χ ν 2 \chi_{\nu}^{2} ) values are shown in the bottom-right corner of the residual maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用GALFIT对十一个NIRCam滤光片进行形态建模的结果。在建模中，星系被分解为十个成分：弧下宿主星系的弥散光（即尾状结构）、两个明亮团块，以及与星团多重像相关的七个致密源。在残差图像中，红色、白色和蓝色分别表示正值、零值和负值。约化卡方值显示在残差图的右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Spectrophotometric data cube constructed by combining NIRCam imaging and NIRSpec IFU data using piXedfit . This data cube is used for spatially resolved SED fitting of the clumps. To create the data cube, the datasets were spatially and spectrally aligned through PSF matching to the spatial resolution of the longest-wavelength grid of the NIRSpec G395H/F290LP data, resampling to a pixel scale of 0 ​ . ′ ′ ​ 1 0\farcs 1 , and aligning normalization between the spectra and the photometry for consistency. The top-left panel displays the [OIII] λ ​ 5007 \lambda\,5007 map, derived from the NIRSpec IFU data by integrating the spectra accross a narrow ( 100 ​ Å 100\,\AA ) wavelength grids centered at the emission line wavelength. The remaining panels show the NIRCam images following spatial alignment and PSF matching to the NIRSpec IFU resolution. The IFU’s FoV is apparent in the top-left panel and is outlined by the white box in the rest of the panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用piXedfit结合NIRCam成像和NIRSpec IFU数据构建的光谱光度数据立方体。该数据立方体用于团块的 spatially resolved SED拟合。为创建数据立方体，数据集通过PSF匹配在空间和光谱上对齐至NIRSpec G395H/F290LP数据最长波长网格的空间分辨率，重采样至0.1角秒的像素尺度，并调整光谱与测光之间的归一化以确保一致性。左上图显示[OIII] λ5007图，由NIRSpec IFU数据在发射线波长中心窄波段（100埃）上积分光谱得到。其余图显示空间对齐和PSF匹配至NIRSpec IFU分辨率后的NIRCam图像。IFU的视场在左上图中可见，并在其他图中由白色方框标出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Results of the SED fitting for the clumps, star clusters (using stacked photometry), and the counter-image, performed with bagpipes . The SED of the star clusters (3, 4, and 5) are obtained from stacking the photometry of their multiple images. In each panel, the observed photometry is shown as green circles. The best-fit model is represented by the blue squares (photometry) and the black line (spectrum).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用bagpipes对团块、星团（使用堆叠测光）和对应像进行SED拟合的结果。星团（3、4和5）的SED来自其多重像测光的堆叠。在每个图中，观测测光以绿色圆圈显示。最佳拟合模型以蓝色方块（测光）和黑色线（光谱）表示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Measured Properties of the Clumps, Star Clusters, and Counter-image
figures.caption_zh: 表1：团块、星团和对应像的测量属性

Georgiev et al., 2009)。对于Cosmic Grapes中的团块，我们仅显示那些引力束缚且有效半径小于70秒差距的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Reconstructed SFH of the clumps 1, 2, and counter-image, obtained from fitting photometry with bagpipes using multiple SFH models: non-parametric SFH with continuity prior (J. Leja et al., 2019 ) , delayed tau, double-power law, and exponentially declining. In each panel, different colors represent different SFH models applied in the SED fitting, and the purple line and shaded region show SFH inferred by prospector for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：团块1、2和对应像的重建恒星形成历史，通过使用多种SFH模型（具有连续性先验的非参数SFH (J. Leja et al., 2019)、延迟tau模型、双幂律模型和指数衰减模型）拟合bagpipes测光得到。在每个图中，不同颜色代表SED拟合中应用的不同SFH模型，紫色线和阴影区域显示prospector推断的SFH以作比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Spectrophotometric SED fits of clumps 1 and 2, and star clusters 3a and 4a, obtained using piXedfit . The black and red spectra represent the observed and best-fit model spectra, respectively, while the green circles and blue open-squares show the corresponding observed and best-fit model photometry. The vertical dashed cyan lines indicate the detected emission lines: HeII λ \lambda 1640, C iii ] λ ​ λ \lambda\lambda 1907,1909, [O ii ] λ ​ λ \lambda\lambda 3726,3729, [Ne iii ] λ \lambda 3870, [Ne iii ] λ \lambda 3969, H δ \delta , H γ \gamma , [O iii ] λ \lambda 4363, H β \beta , [O iii ] λ \lambda 4959, [O iii ] λ \lambda 5007, HeI λ \lambda 5877, and H α \alpha . The emission lines are fitted with a single Gaussian profile. The vertical shaded regions indicate the gaps between the detector chips. The cyan ellipses and circles denote the apertures used for calculating the integrated spectrophotometric SEDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用piXedfit获得的团块1和2以及星团3a和4a的光谱光度SED拟合。黑色和红色光谱分别表示观测和最佳拟合模型光谱，绿色圆圈和蓝色空心方块显示相应的观测和最佳拟合模型测光。垂直虚线青色线表示检测到的发射线：HeII λ1640、C iii] λλ1907,1909、[O ii] λλ3726,3729、[Ne iii] λ3870、[Ne iii] λ3969、Hδ、Hγ、[O iii] λ4363、Hβ、[O iii] λ4959、[O iii] λ5007、HeI λ5877和Hα。发射线使用单高斯轮廓拟合。垂直阴影区域表示探测器芯片之间的间隙。青色椭圆和圆圈表示用于计算积分光谱光度SED的孔径。

title: Finite-Core Signatures in LISA-Band Wave-Optics Lensing by Low-Mass Dark Matter Halos
summary: LISA-band gravitational waves from massive binary black holes can be diffractively lensed by low-mass dark matter halos and subhalos, so their frequency-dependent amplification can probe the inner density profile. We isolate the generic finite-core part of this signal by comparing fixed-mass Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW) and cored-NFW lenses and propagating both profiles to the complex wave-optics amplification factor. A finite core smooths the time-delay response and reshapes the diffraction peak; an NFW template with a lower concentration can mimic part of the effect, but structured complex residuals remain after time and phase alignment. The residual peaks for intermediate cores, $r_c/r_s\simeq0.25$--$0.3$. An SIDM-inspired isothermal-core profile gives the same qualitative response, showing that the signal is not an artifact of one cored parameterization. For a fiducial LISA source, an appreciable mismatch requires favorable near alignment and $M_{\rm vir}\gtrsim 10^7M_\odot$. The result is a finite-core baseline for isolated line-of-sight halos and for subhalos perturbing strongly lensed macro-images.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LISA频段引力波被暗物质晕衍射透镜效应，发现有限核结构会在波光学放大因子中留下独特特征，可用于探测暗物质晕的内部密度分布。
AI.motivation: 利用LISA频段引力波被低质量暗物质晕衍射透镜时的频率依赖性放大效应，来探测暗物质晕的内部密度廓线，特别是区分有核和无核结构。
AI.method: 通过比较固定质量的NFW和有核NFW透镜模型，将两种密度廓线传播到复波光学放大因子中，分析有限核结构对时间延迟响应和衍射峰的影响。
AI.result: 有限核结构会平滑时间延迟响应并重塑衍射峰；中间核尺度（rc/rs≈0.25-0.3）时残差峰值最大；SIDM等温核廓线给出相似结果；对于LISA源，需要有利的近对齐和Mvir≳10^7M⊙才能产生可观测的失配信号。
AI.conclusion: 研究建立了有限核基线模型，可用于隔离视线方向暗物质晕和微扰强透镜宏像的子晕的衍射信号分析。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 来自大质量双黑洞的LISA波段引力波可被低质量暗物质晕和子晕衍射透镜化，因此其频率依赖的放大效应能够探测内部密度轮廓。我们通过比较固定质量的Navarro-Frenk-White (NFW)和带核NFW透镜，并将两种轮廓传播到复波光学放大因子，分离出该信号的通用有限核部分。有限核平滑了时延响应并重塑了衍射峰；一个浓度较低的NFW模板可以模仿部分效应，但在时间和相位对齐后仍存在结构化的复数残差。残差峰值出现在中等核尺度，$r_c/r_s\simeq0.25$--$0.3$。一个受SIDM启发的等温核轮廓给出了相同的定性响应，表明该信号并非某一种带核参数化的人为产物。对于一个基准LISA源，可察觉的失配需要有利的近对齐和$M_{\rm vir}\gtrsim 10^7M_\odot$。结果为孤立视线方向晕和扰动强透镜宏像的子晕建立了一个有限核基线。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，研究建立了有限核基线模型，可用于隔离视线方向暗物质晕和微扰强透镜宏像的子晕的衍射信号分析。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Convergence \(\kappa(u)\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos, where \(u=\xi/r_{s}\) . The three panels correspond to \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) . The black solid curve denotes the NFW profile, while the dashed, dash-dotted, and dotted curves correspond to cored-NFW profiles with \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) , respectively. A finite core suppresses the central convergence, with stronger suppression for larger \(r_{c}/r_{s}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1: NFW和带核NFW晕的收敛度 \(\kappa(u)\) ，其中 \(u=\xi/r_{s}\) 。三个面板分别对应 \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) 。黑色实线表示NFW轮廓，而虚线、点划线和点线分别对应核半径 \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) 的带核NFW轮廓。有限核抑制了中心收敛度，且 \(r_{c}/r_{s}\) 越大抑制越强。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Lensing potential \(\psi(u)\) for the same halo models as in Fig. 1 . The cored-NFW profiles produce a shallower inner potential than the NFW halo, and the difference increases with the core size. Since \(\psi\) enters the Fermat potential, these inner-potential differences are expected to propagate into both the time-domain and frequency-domain wave-optics observables.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 与图1相同晕模型的透镜势 \(\psi(u)\) 。带核NFW轮廓产生的内部势比NFW晕更浅，且差异随核尺寸增大而增加。由于 \(\psi\) 进入费马势，这些内部势差异预计会传播到时域和频域波光学可观测量的两者中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Time-domain diffraction integral \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos. The three columns correspond to \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) . The colors denote the impact parameters \(y=3,5,8\) , and the different line styles denote NFW and cored-NFW profiles with \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) . A finite core lowers and broadens the time-domain response, especially at small impact parameter.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: NFW和带核NFW晕的时域衍射积分 \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) 。三列分别对应 \(M_{vir}=10^{6},10^{7},10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) 。颜色表示碰撞参数 \(y=3,5,8\) ，不同线型表示NFW和核半径 \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1,0.3,0.5\) 的带核NFW轮廓。有限核降低并展宽了时域响应，尤其在碰撞参数较小时。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Frequency-domain amplification factor \(|F(w)|\) for NFW and cored-NFW halos. The notation is the same as in Fig. 3 . The finite core changes both the first diffraction peak and the subsequent oscillatory structure. The effect is strongest for small impact parameter and becomes more pronounced for larger core size.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: NFW和带核NFW晕的频域放大因子 \(|F(w)|\) 。符号与图3相同。有限核改变了第一个衍射峰及随后的振荡结构。该效应在碰撞参数最小时最强，且随核尺寸增大而更加显著。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: SIDM-inspired IC-NFW comparison for \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) , \(z_{L}=0.5\) , and \(z_{S}=2.0\) . Left: time-domain diffraction integral \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) . Right: frequency-domain amplification factor \(|F(w)|\) . The solid curves denote the NFW halo, while the dashed and dash-dotted curves denote IC-NFW profiles with \(s=0.1\) and \(s=1\) , respectively. The colors correspond to \(y=3,5,8\) . The SIDM-inspired core modifies both \(I(\tau)\) and \(|F(w)|\) . The \(s=0.1\) curves are close to NFW, while the \(s=1\) case shows a more visible deviation, especially at smaller impact parameter.
figures.caption_zh: 图5: 受SIDM启发的IC-NFW比较，参数为 \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) ， \(z_{L}=0.5\) ， \(z_{S}=2.0\) 。左图：时域衍射积分 \(I(\tau)/(2\pi)\) 。右图：频域放大因子 \(|F(w)|\) 。实线表示NFW晕，虚线和点划线分别表示参数 \(s=0.1\) 和 \(s=1\) 的IC-NFW轮廓。颜色对应 \(y=3,5,8\) 。受SIDM启发的核修改了 \(I(\tau)\) 和 \(|F(w)|\) 两者。 \(s=0.1\) 曲线接近NFW，而 \(s=1\) 情况显示出更明显的偏差，尤其在碰撞参数较小时。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Template-fitting residual in the \(y_{NFW}\) - \(c_{NFW}\) plane. The color scale shows \(\log_{10}D_{full}\) , where \(D_{full}\) is the transfer-function residual norm defined in Appendix A . The cored-NFW truth has \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) , \(z_{L}=0.5\) , \(z_{S}=2.0\) , \(y_{true}=3\) , \(c_{true}=10\) , and \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1\) . The dashed horizontal line marks the true cored-NFW impact parameter, while the star denotes the best-fit NFW template.
figures.caption_zh: 图6: \(y_{NFW}\) - \(c_{NFW}\) 平面上的模板拟合残差。颜色标度显示 \(\log_{10}D_{full}\) ，其中 \(D_{full}\) 是附录A中定义的传递函数残差范数。带核NFW真实值参数为 \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) ， \(z_{L}=0.5\) ， \(z_{S}=2.0\) ， \(y_{true}=3\) ， \(c_{true}=10\) ， \(r_{c}/r_{s}=0.1\) 。虚线水平线标记真实的带核NFW碰撞参数，星号表示最佳拟合的NFW模板。

The lower panel shows the logarithmic amplitude residual \(\Delta\ln|F|\) . Although the best-fit NFW template closely follows the overall amplification curve, a structured residual remains around the diffraction-transition regime.

The fiducial truth has \(M_{vir}=10^{7}\,M_{\odot}\) , \(z_{L}=0.5\) , \(z_{S}=2.0\) , \(y_{true}=3\) , and \(c_{true}=10\) . The distinguishability first increases with core size, reaches a broad maximum around \(r_{c}/r_{s}\simeq 0.25\) – \(0.3\) , and then decreases slowly.

title: ALMA CO-CAVITY I. Resolved Molecular Gas in Void Galaxies
comment: 20 pages, 12 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The environment plays a key role in galaxy evolution, yet it remains unclear how detailed molecular gas properties and their connection to star formation and stellar content are influenced by both large-scale and local environments. Here we introduce the ALMA CO-CAVITY project, the first interferometric CO(1-0) survey of a large sample of 41 void galaxies (VGs) to characterise in detail their molecular gas properties. It is built over the CAVITY project, offering optical integral field unit (IFU) data, enabling a direct, pixel-to-pixel comparison between molecular gas (from ALMA), star formation, and stellar properties, as well as the derivation of their scaling relations. In this work we present ALMA data products for our sample, containing data cubes, moment maps and position-velocity diagrams at angular resolutions of 1 arcsec. We also present molecular gas, stellar mass, and star formation rate surface density maps at a common resolution of 2.5 arcsec. We contextualise our sample against representative unresolved and resolved surveys. While our sample provides a good representation of the VG population and follows the distribution of key properties seen in star-forming galaxy samples, galaxies included in resolved studies from the literature tend to be more massive, less isolated, and located in denser large-scale environments. We present global scaling relations for the ALMA CO-CAVITY sample and find that the molecular gas main sequence exhibits the smallest scatter (0.21 dex), followed by the Schmidt-Kennicutt relation and the star-forming main sequence. From integrated properties alone, we find that these scaling relations for VGs are compatible with those for denser environments. This paper lays the foundation for forthcoming studies exploiting this unique dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了ALMA CO-CAVITY项目，利用ALMA望远镜对41个空洞星系（VGs）进行CO(1-0)巡天观测，结合CAVITY项目的光学IFU数据，实现了分子气体、恒星形成和恒星性质在像素级别的直接比较，并给出了数据产品、表面密度图和全局标度关系。研究发现空洞星系的标度关系与稠密环境中的星系兼容。
AI.motivation: 环境在星系演化中起着关键作用，但大尺度环境和局部环境如何影响分子气体性质及其与恒星形成、恒星含量的关系仍不清楚。现有研究多集中在致密环境中的星系，对空洞星系（低密度环境）的详细分子气体性质研究匮乏。
AI.method: 采用ALMA干涉仪对41个空洞星系进行CO(1-0)分子气体观测，结合CAVITY项目的光学积分场单元（IFU）数据，构建像素级对比。生成数据立方体、矩图、位置-速度图，以及共同分辨率2.5角秒的表面密度图，并与已有巡天数据进行比较。
AI.result: 提供了ALMA数据产品（数据立方体、矩图、PV图等）和分辨率统一的表面密度图。发现样本很好地代表了空洞星系群体，但已有文献中的解析研究样本更偏大质量、更不孤立、位于更稠密的大尺度环境。分子气体主序散度最小（0.21 dex），其次是Schmidt-Kennicutt关系和恒星形成主序。空洞星系的标度关系与致密环境中的星系兼容。
AI.conclusion: ALMA CO-CAVITY项目为后续详细研究空洞星系分子气体性质及其与恒星形成关系奠定了基础，填补了低密度环境下分子气体高分辨研究的空白。从整体性质来看，空洞星系的标度关系与致密环境中的星系没有显著差异。

title: The Structure of Molecular Gas in PHANGS-ALMA Galaxies: Cloud Spacing, Two-Point Correlation and Stacked Intensity Profiles
comment: 18 pages main text, 5 pages appendix, 13 figures, accepted to A&A
summary: The sub-kpc scale gas structure encodes key information of giant molecular cloud (GMC) formation. Therefore, we aim for a quantitative description of molecular gas structure across 150-1000 pc using a sample of 8984 GMCs from 40 galaxies observed by PHANGS-ALMA. We homogenize our data to a fixed resolution of 150 pc and mass sensitivity of 2.5 M$_{\odot}$ pc$^{-2}$ to remove observational bias. We then calculate nearest neighbour distances, neighbour number density, and two-point correlation functions for the catalogued GMCs. When analysing the two-point correlation function, we generate several control samples that reflect different null hypotheses on large spatial scales. We stack integrated intensity CO emission profiles around the position of catalogued GMCs to probe the gas distribution on scales between the resolution limit and the typical GMC-GMC spacing. Our measurements of cloud spacing and number of neighbours show that GMC clustering follows the large-scale gas distribution. Once we account for this contribution, the peak excess clustering in the two-point correlation function drops from 1+$ω$ of 2.3 to 1.3, with the power-law slope flattened from -0.25 to 0. We show that the stacked CO intensity profiles around CO peaks can be recovered by the "GMC size" measured by CPROPS, with an additional 20% of the flux in an extended component beyond 500 pc. We find that our stacked profiles can be fit with a double Gaussian function plus a constant offset. The broad Gaussian component accounts for 70% of the over-density power above the constant offset, and is stronger around massive and gravitationally bound GMCs. Our results indicate that galactic structure regulates the GMC distribution in galaxy disks, and the formation of massive, gravitationally bound GMCs is related to strong local gas clustering.

AI.tldr: 利用PHANGS-ALMA观测的8984个巨分子云，在150-1000 pc尺度上定量分析分子气体结构，发现星系结构调控GMC分布，大质量束缚GMC形成与局部气体聚集相关。
AI.motivation: 亚千秒差距尺度的气体结构包含巨分子云形成的关键信息，需要定量描述分子气体在150-1000 pc尺度的结构特征，以理解GMC形成机制。
AI.method: 使用PHANGS-ALMA观测的40个星系中8984个GMC样本，将数据统一到150 pc分辨率和2.5 M⊙ pc⁻²质量灵敏度；计算最近邻距离、邻居数密度和两点相关函数；生成多个对照样本以反映不同零假设；在GMC位置周围堆叠CO积分强度剖面。
AI.result: GMC聚类遵循大尺度气体分布，考虑此贡献后两点相关函数峰值从2.3降至1.3，幂律斜率从-0.25变平至0；堆叠CO剖面可由CPROPS测量的"GMC大小"恢复，额外20%通量在500 pc外的扩展成分中；剖面可用双高斯函数加常数偏移拟合，宽高斯成分占常数偏移以上过密度功率的70%，在大质量束缚GMC周围更强。
AI.conclusion: 星系结构调控星系盘中的GMC分布，大质量、引力束缚的GMC形成与强烈的局部气体聚集相关。

authors: the LSST Dark Energy Science Collaboration
title: SLSim: a strong lensing population simulation package
summary: Gravitational lensing offers unique insights into cosmology by bending light around massive objects. Strong gravitational lensing, in particular, produces magnified and often multiple images of distant sources, crucial for precise cosmological measurements and understanding the distribution of dark matter in the universe. Current studies are limited by the number of strong gravitational lenses. From upcoming cosmological surveys, we anticipate observing a several orders of magnitude increase in the number of lenses, for both static and transient phenomena. However, detecting and analyzing these events from vast surveys like Vera C. Rubin Observatory Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) presents significant challenges. To prepare for these challenges, we introduce SLSim, a versatile simulation tool tailored for the Vera C. Rubin Observatory. SLSim integrates advanced astrophysical models with computational efficiency to generate synthetic strong lens populations under realistic observational conditions. SLSim simulates static and variable lensing scenarios, essential for cosmological studies, training and testing lens search and data analysis pipelines. This paper details SLSim,'s design and implementation, emphasizing its modularity and capabilities across various astrophysical regimes. Validation against observational data and existing simulations confirms SLSim's accuracy in reproducing observed lensing phenomena. SLSim is publicly available at https://github.com/LSST-strong-lensing/slsim, and we anticipate continued development and expansion of its capabilities. Users are encouraged to check the repository for updates and to contribute to ongoing community efforts in strong lensing simulations.

AI.tldr: SLSim是一个为Vera C. Rubin天文台设计的强引力透镜模拟工具，用于应对未来大规模巡天中透镜事件数量剧增带来的挑战，通过生成合成透镜种群支持宇宙学研究。
AI.motivation: 未来宇宙学巡天（如LSST）预计将观测到数量级增长的强引力透镜事件，但现有研究受限于透镜数量，需要高效工具来模拟、检测和分析这些事件。
AI.method: 开发了SLSim模拟工具，整合先进天体物理模型与计算效率，生成符合实际观测条件的合成强透镜种群，支持静态和可变透镜场景，具有模块化设计。
AI.result: SLSim能够准确再现观测到的透镜现象，已通过观测数据和现有模拟验证，工具已公开可用并支持社区持续开发。
AI.conclusion: SLSim为应对未来大规模强引力透镜观测挑战提供了关键工具，其模块化设计和公开可用性将促进宇宙学研究和透镜分析流程的发展。

title: A tight relation between the distribution of globular clusters and dark matter in AS1063
summary: Based on deep high resolution JWST images of AS1063, and after a careful masking of artifacts, extended features in the cluster, and background galaxies (including known lensed ones), we have identified tens of thousands of unresolved point sources in the central region of the galaxy cluster. We extended the identification of these point sources up to 1.18 Mpc from the center of the cluster using data in the second module. Most of these sources are expected to be globular clusters orbiting in the deep potential well of the cluster, but also the surviving compact cores of satellite galaxies. We study the distribution of the globular clusters and compared it with the distribution of mass from a lens model derived from the same JWST data. We find a very tight correlation between the two distributions, but also some differences, including a more concentrated distribution for the globular clusters than for dark matter. We explored the possibility of using the distribution of globular clusters as a proxy for the lensing mass. We find that a simple smoothing kernel can transform the discrete distribution of point sources into a continuous two-dimensional distribution that matches well the lensing convergence. This suggests that globular clusters can be used as tracers of the dark matter distribution in other massive clusters where gravitational lensing constraints are scarce but globular clusters can be detected more easily, for instance in low redshift galaxy clusters.

AI.tldr: 基于JWST对AS1063星系团的深度高分辨率图像，研究人员识别出数万个点源，主要是球状星团和卫星星系核心，发现球状星团分布与引力透镜质量分布高度相关但更集中，提出球状星团可作为暗物质分布的示踪剂。
AI.motivation: 研究星系团中球状星团的分布特征，探索其与暗物质分布的关系，为在缺乏引力透镜约束的星系团中利用球状星团作为暗物质示踪剂提供可能性。
AI.method: 使用JWST深度高分辨率图像，仔细掩蔽伪影、扩展特征和背景星系后，在星系团中心区域识别数万个未分辨点源，扩展到1.18 Mpc范围；将球状星团分布与同一JWST数据推导的透镜模型质量分布进行比较分析。
AI.result: 发现球状星团分布与透镜质量分布存在非常紧密的相关性，但球状星团分布比暗物质更集中；通过简单平滑核可将离散点源分布转换为连续二维分布，与透镜收敛度匹配良好。
AI.conclusion: 球状星团可作为暗物质分布的示踪剂，特别是在引力透镜约束稀缺但球状星团易于探测的低红移星系团中，为研究暗物质分布提供了新方法。
